title: U Mtakatifu
swahili_lyrics:
U Mtakatifu! Mungu Mwenyezi!
Alfajiri sifa zako tutaimba,
U Mtakatifu, Bwana wa huruma,
Mungu wa vyote, hata milele.

U Mtakatifu! Na malaika,
Wengi sana wanakuabudu wote.
Elfu na maelfu, wanakusujudu,
Wa zamani na hata milele.

U Mtakatifu! Ingawa giza,
Lakuficha fahari tusiione,
U Mtakatifu! Wewe peke yako,
Kamili kwa uwezo na pendo.
english_lyrics:
You are holy! God Almighty!
At dawn we will sing your praises,
Holy One, Lord of mercy,
God of all, forever.

You are holy! And angels,
Many worship you all.
Thousands and thousands, they worship you,
Ancient and eternal.

You are holy! Although dark,
You hide your pride so we don't see it,
You are holy! you alone,
Perfect for power and love.

title: Twamsifu Mungu
swahili_lyrics:
Twamsifu Mungu, Mwana wa upendo,
Aliyetufia na kupaa juu.

Aleluya! usifiwe, Aleluya! Amin;
Aleluya! usifiwe, utubariki.

Twamsifu Mungu, Roho Mtukufu,
Akatufunulia Mwokozi wetu.

Twamsifu Mwana, aliyetufia,
Ametukomboa na kutuongoza.

Twamsifu Mungu, wa neema yote,
Aliyetwaa dhambi akazifuta.

Tuamshe tena, tujaze na pendo,
Moyoni uwashe moto wa Roho.
english_lyrics:
We praise God, Son of love,
Who died and ascended.

Hallelujah! be praised, Hallelujah! Amen;
Hallelujah! be praised, bless us.

We praise God, the Holy Spirit,
He revealed to us our Savior.

We praise the Son, who died for us,
He has redeemed us and guided us.

We praise God, of all grace,
He who took sins and wiped them away.

Wake us up again, fill us with love,
In the heart, light the fire of the Spirit.

title: Mungu Atukuzwe
swahili_lyrics:
Mungu atukuzwe, kwa mambo makuu,
Upendo wake ulitupa Yesu,
Aliyejitoa maisha yake,
Tuwe nao uzima wa milele.

Msifu, msifu, dunia sikia,
Msifu, msifu watu wafurahi,
Na uje kwa Baba, kwa Yesu Mwana,
Ukamtukuze kwa mambo yote.

Wokovu kamili, zawadi kwetu,
Ahadi ya Mungu kwa ulimwengu,
Wanaomwamini na kuungama,
Mara moja wale husamehewa.

Alitufundisha mambo makuu,
Alihakikisha wokovu wetu,
Lakini zaidi ajabu kubwa,
Yesu atakuja na tutamwona.
english_lyrics:
God be glorified, for great things,
His love gave us Jesus,
Who gave his life,
May we have eternal life.

Praise him, praise him, hear the world,
Praise him, praise him, let the people be happy,
And come to the Father, to Jesus the Son,
You glorified him in all things.

Complete salvation, gift to us,
God's promise to the world,
Those who believe and confess,
Immediately those are forgiven.

He taught us great things,
He ensured our salvation,
But more great wonder,
Jesus will come and we will see him.

title: Jina la Yesu, Salamu
swahili_lyrics:
Jina la Yesu, salamu! lisujudieni,
Ninyi mbinguni, hukumu na enzi mpeni.
Ninyi mbinguni, hukumu na enzi mpeni.

Enzi na apewe kwenu, watetea dini;
Mkuzeni Bwana wenu, na enzi mpeni.
Mkuzeni Bwana wenu, na enzi mpeni.

Enyi mbegu ya rehema, nanyi msifuni
Mmeponywa kwa neema, na enzi mpeni.
Mmeponywa kwa neema, na enzi mpeni.

Wenye dhambi kumbukeni, ya msalabani.
Kwa furaha msifuni, na enzi mpeni.
Kwa furaha msifuni, na enzi mpeni.

Kila mtu duniani msujudieni,
Kote-kote msifuni, na enzi mpeni.
Kote-kote msifuni, na enzi mpeni.

Sisi na wao pamoja tu mumo sifani.
Milele sifa ni moja, ni enzi mpeni.
Milele sifa ni moja, ni enzi mpeni.
english_lyrics:
Jesus name, greetings! bow down,
You in heaven, give him judgment and power.
You in heaven, give him judgment and power.

May the kingdom be given to you, defenders of religion;
Magnify your Lord, and give him power.
Magnify your Lord, and give him power.

O seed of mercy, and praise him
You have been healed by grace, may the Lord grant him.
You have been healed by grace, may the Lord grant him.

Sinners remember, of the cross.
With joy praise him, and reign him.
With joy praise him, and reign him.

Everyone in the world bow to him,
Praise him everywhere, and the kingdom will give him.
Praise him everywhere, and the kingdom will give him.

We and them just together in the room.
Forever praise is one, it is forever.
Forever praise is one, it is forever.

title: Na Tumwabudu Huyo Mfalme
swahili_lyrics:
Na tumwabudu huyo Mfalme,
Sifa za nguvu zake zivume;
Ni ngao, ni ngome, Yeye milele,
Ndizo sifa zake kale na kale.

Tazameni ulimwengu huu,
Ulivyoumbwa, ajabu kuu;
Sasa umewekwa pahali pake,
Hata utimize majira yake.

Kwa ulinzi wako, kwetu Bwana,
Twakushukuru, U mwema sana;
Hupewa chakula kila kiumbe,
Kila kitu kina mahali pake.

Wanadamu tu wanyonge sana,
Twakutumaini Wewe, Bwana;
Kamwe haupungui wako wema,
Mkombozi wetu, Rafiki mwema.
english_lyrics:
And let us worship the King,
Let the praises of his strength be heard;
It is a shield, it is a fortress, He forever,
Those are his ancient and ancient characteristics.

Look at this world,
How you were created, great wonder;
Now you are put in place,
Even fulfill its season.

For your protection, for us Lord,
We thank you, You are very good;
Every creature is given food,
Everything has its place.

Only very weak humans,
We trust in You, Lord;
You never lack your goodness,
Our Redeemer, Good Friend.

title: Kumekucha kwa Uzuri
swahili_lyrics:
Kumekucha kwa uzuri, nafumbua macho,
Baba amenihifadhi, ni wake mtoto.

Bwana niwe leo kutwa, ulinzini mwako,
Nisamehe dhambi, niwe mikononi mwako.

Roho wako anikae, moyoni daima,
Anitakase nione, uso wako mwema.
english_lyrics:
It is dawning beautifully, I open my eyes,
Father has saved me, the child is his.

Lord, may I be in your protection today,
Forgive my sins, let me be in your hands.

May your spirit stay, always in my heart,
I want to see your beautiful face.

title: Mungu Msaada Wetu
swahili_lyrics:
Mungu Msaada wetu, tangu miaka yote,
Ndiwe tumaini letu, la zamani zote.

Kivuli cha kiti chako, ndiyo ngome yetu,
Watosha mkono wako, ni ulinzi wetu.

Kwanza havijakuwako, nchi na milima,
Ndiwe Mungu, chini yako twakaa salama.

Na miaka elfu ni kama, siku moja kwako;
Utatulinda daima, tu raia wako.

Bwana Msaada wetu tangu miaka yote,
Mlinzi wetu na ngome, daima, milele.
english_lyrics:
God our Help, through all the years,
You are our hope, of all times.

The shadow of your seat, is our fortress,
Enough of your hand, it is our protection.

First there were no lands and mountains,
You are God, under you we stay safe.

And a thousand years is like, one day to you;
You will always protect us, only your subjects.

Lord our Help through the years,
Our protector and fortress, always, forever.

title: Unisikie Ninapolia
swahili_lyrics:
Unisikie ninapolia, uje Mkombozi,
Moyo wangu hukutazamia, uje Mkombozi.

Nimepotea mbali na kwangu, nimetanga peke
yangu, Unichukulie sasa kwako, uje Mkombozi.

Sina pahali pa kupumzika, uje Mkombozi,
Unipe raha, nuru, uzima, uje Mkombozi.

Nimechoka, Njia ni ndefu uje Mkombozi,
Macho yako kuona nataka, uje Mkombozi.

Bwana, daima hutanidharau, uje Mkombozi, Kilio
changu utanijibu, uje Mkombozi.
english_lyrics:
Hear me when I cry, come Redeemer,
My heart is waiting for you, come Mkombozi.

I am lost far from myself, I have wandered alone
my, Take me now to you, come Mkombozi.

I have no place to rest, come Mkombozi,
Give me pleasure, light, life, come Redeemer.

I'm tired, the road is long, come Mkombozi,
I want your eyes to see, come Mkombozi.

Lord, you will not always despise me, come Redeemer, Cry
you will answer me, come Mkombozi.

title: Mwumbaji Mfalme
swahili_lyrics:
Mwumbaji Mfalme, vitu vyote vyako,
Ni kwa ukarimu wako ninabarikiwa,
Ni kwa ukarimu wako ninabarikiwa.

Uliyeniumba, Nakutegemea,
Sina budi kuzisifu hisani zako kuu,
Sina budi kuzisifu hisani zako kuu.

Nitatoa Nini? Kwanza vyote vyako,
Upendo wako wadai moyo wa shukrani,
Upendo wado wadai moyo wa shukrani.

Nipewe neema, Niwe na uwezo,
Wa kuishi kwako, Bwana siku zangu zako,
Wa kuishi kwako, Bwana siku zangu zako.
english_lyrics:
Creator King, all your things,
It is by your generosity that I am blessed,
It is by your generosity that I am blessed.

You made me, I trust you,
I must praise your great benefactions,
I have to praise your great benevolence.

What Will I Offer? First of all yours,
Your love demands a grateful heart,
Love demands a heart of gratitude.

Give me grace, May I be able,
Of your living, Lord, my days are yours,
Of your living, Lord, my days are yours.

title: Kristo wa Neema Yote
swahili_lyrics:
Kristo wa neema yote, imbisha moyo wangu,
Mifulizo ya baraka, inaamsha shangwe kuu,
Unifunze nikupende, nikuandame kote,
Moyo wangu ukajae, furaha na tumai.

Namshukuru sana Bwana, aniwezesha huku.
Salama aniongoza, hata kule nyumbani,
Yesu alinitafuta, njiani mbali kwake,
Akatoa damu yake, nipone hatarini.

Kweli mimi mwiwa mkubwa, wa neema daima
Wema wako unifunge, zaidi kwako Bwana,
Ili nisivutwe tena, kukuacha ee Mponya,
Nitwalie moyo wangu, uwe wako kamili.
english_lyrics:
Christ of all grace, make my heart sing,
A succession of blessings, awakens great joy,
Teach me to love you, to accompany you everywhere,
May my heart be filled with joy and hope.

I am very grateful to the Lord, he enables me here.
Peace guides me, even there at home,
Jesus looked for me, on the way away from him,
He gave his blood, to heal me in danger.

Truly, I am a great, always gracious person
Your goodness binds me, more to you Lord,
That I may not be drawn again, to leave you O Healer,
Take my heart, be yours completely.

title: Sauti Zote Ziimbe
swahili_lyrics:
Sauti zote ziimbe, jina la Yesu li heri!
Sifa za Mfalme Mungu, jina la Yesu li heri!

Jina li heri, jina li heri, jina la Yesu li heri!
Jina li heri, jina li heri, jina la Yesu li heri!

Hofu zote latuliza, jina la Yesu li heri!
Mwenye dhambi hukubali, jina la Yesu li heri!

Huvunja nguvu za dhambi, jina la Yesu li heri!
Damu yake hutakasa, jina la Yesu li heri!

Sauti yake ni tamu, jina la Yesu li heri!
Wafu nao hufufua, jina la Yesu li heri!

Lugha maelfu zitaimba, jina la Yesu li heri!
Astahili Mwana-Kondoo, jina la Yesu li heri!
english_lyrics:
Let all voices sing, the name of Jesus is blessed!
The praises of the King God, blessed is the name of Jesus!

The name is blessed, the name is blessed, the name of Jesus is blessed!
The name is blessed, the name is blessed, the name of Jesus is blessed!

All fears calm down, blessed is the name of Jesus!
The sinner accepts, blessed is the name of Jesus!

Breaks the power of sin, blessed is the name of Jesus!
His blood cleanses, blessed is the name of Jesus!

His voice is sweet, the name of Jesus is blessed!
The dead also rise, blessed is the name of Jesus!

Thousands of languages ​​will sing, the name of Jesus is blessed!
Worthy is the Lamb, blessed be the name of Jesus!

Msifu Mungu wa neema,
Enyi viumbe po pote;
Wa juu pia sifuni,
Baba, Mwana naye Roho!
english_lyrics:
Praise the God of grace,
O creatures everywhere;
The high one also praises,
Father, Son and Spirit!

title: Umetuahidi
swahili_lyrics:
Umetuahidi, kwamba wawili, watatu kwa jina lako
wakija, Utawabariki, kwa hivi leo twapiga magoti
nyumbani pako.

Yesu uje kwetu, utubariki;
Yesu uje kwetu, uwe karibu.

Umekuwa nasi, siku nyingine, tunakuhitaji mpaka mwisho,
Uje Mkombozi, tupe neema, tusikie Yesu, utubariki.

Uje utawale sauti zetu, nyimbo nazo sala, uziagize.
Imani izidi, ikamilike, pendo liwe safi na njia nuru.
english_lyrics:
You have promised us, that two, three in your name
when they come, You will bless them, for today we kneel
your home

Jesus come to us, bless us;
Jesus come to us, be near.

You have been with us, another day, we need you until the end,
Come Redeemer, give us grace, let us hear Jesus, bless us.

Come and rule our voices, songs and prayers, order them.
May faith increase, be complete, love be pure and the path light.

title: Nitembee Nawe
swahili_lyrics:
Nitembee nawe Mungu, alivyotembea Henoko,
Mkono wangu uushike, unene nami kwa pole,
Ingawa njia siioni, Yesu nitembee nawe.

Siwezi tembea pekee, pana dhoruba angani,
Mitego ya miguu elfu, adui wengi hufichwa,
Uitulize bahari, Yesu nitembee nawe.

Ukinishika mkono, anasa kwangu hasara,
Kwa nguvu nitasafiri, ‘tautwika msalaba,
Hata mji wa Sayuni, Yesu nitembee nawe.
english_lyrics:
Walk with me God, as Enoch walked,
Hold my hand, speak to me gently,
Even though I don't see the way, Jesus let me walk with you.

I can't walk alone, there's a storm in the sky,
Traps of a thousand feet, many enemies are hidden,
Calm the sea, Jesus let me walk with you.

If you hold my hand, my pleasure is loss,
With strength I will travel, I will carry the cross,
Even the city of Zion, Jesus let me walk with you.

title: Nena Rohoni Yesu
swahili_lyrics:
Nena rohoni Yesu, nena kwa upole,
Sema kwangu kwa pendo, “huachwi upweke,”
Fungua moyo wangu, nisikie mara,
Jaza roho na sifa, sifa zako Bwana.

Kila siku unene, vile kwa upole.
Nong’oneza kwa pole, upole wa pendo,
“Daima utashinda, uhuru ni wako.”
Nisikie maneno, “huachwi upweke.”

Nena kwa wana wako, waonyeshe njia,
Wajaze kwa furaha, fundisha kuomba,
Wajifunze kutoa, maisha kamili,
Wahimize ufalme, tumwone Mwokozi.

Nena kama zamani, ulipoitoa,
Sheria takatifu, niishike pia,
Nipate kutukuza Wewe Mungu wangu,
Mapenzi yako tena, daima kusifu.
english_lyrics:
Speak in the spirit Jesus, speak softly,
Tell me with love, "you are not left alone,"
Open my heart, hear me soon,
Fill the soul with praise, your praises Lord.

Every day you get fat, gently.
Whisper gently, gently of love,
"You will always win, freedom is yours."
Hear the words, "you are not left alone."

Speak to your sons, show them the way,
Fill them with joy, teach them to pray,
Learn to give, a full life,
Encourage the kingdom, let us see the Savior.

Say as of old, when you gave it,
Holy law, hold me too,
May I glorify You my God,
Love you again, always praise.

title: Bwana Ninakuhitaji
swahili_lyrics:
Bwana ninakuhitaji, Ni mpofu, maskini,
Unishike mkononi, kwako napata nguvu.

Kila saa, kila saa, Bwana ninakuhitaji,
Kila saa, kila saa, unilinde kila saa.

Univike na mavazi, ya usikivu wako,
Nguo zangu zote chafu, nazitamani zako.

Wewe ukiniongoza, nitakwenda salama,
Nenda nami siku zote, u nuru na uzima.

Na ikiwa huko mbele, sehemu yangu ngumu,
Au ikiwa furaha, unilinde kila saa.
english_lyrics:
Lord I need you, I am blind, poor,
Hold me by the hand, I get strength from you.

Every hour, every hour, Lord I need you,
Every hour, every hour, protect me every hour.

Dress me in the garments of your attentiveness,
All my dirty clothes, I want yours.

If you guide me, I will go safely,
Go with me always, you are light and life.

And if there ahead, my hard part,
Or if happy, protect me every hour.

title: Si Mimi, Kristo
swahili_lyrics:
Si mimi, Kristo astahili sifa,
Si mimi, Kristo ajulikane,
Si mimi, Kristo katika maneno,
Si mimi, Kristo kwa kila tendo.

Si mimi, Kristo kuponya huzuni,
Kristo pekee, kufuta machozi,
Si mimi, Kristo kubeba mzigo,
Si mimi, Kristo kutoa hofu.

Kristo pekee, pasipo kujisifu,
Kristo pekee, na nisizungumze,
Kristo pekee, na hakuna kiburi,
Kristo pekee, sifa yangu ife.

Kristo pekee, mahitaji atoe,
Si mimi, Kristo, kisima changu,
Kristo pekee, kwa mwili na kwa moyo,
Si mimi, Kristo, hata milele.
english_lyrics:
Not I, Christ deserves the praise,
Not me, Christ be known,
Not I, Christ in words,
Not me, Christ in every action.

Not I, Christ to heal sorrow,
Christ alone, wipe away the tears,
Not I, Christ to bear the burden,
Not I, Christ give fear.

Christ alone, without boasting,
Christ alone, let me not speak,
Christ alone, and no pride,
Christ alone, let my praise die.

Christ alone, needs to provide,
Not I, Christ, my well,
Christ alone, in body and soul,
Not I, Christ, for ever.

title: Mwokozi Kama Mchunga
swahili_lyrics:
Mwokozi kama mchunga, utuongoze leo,
Ututume malishoni, fanya tayari boma,
Bwana Yesu peke yako, umetuvuta kwako.

Tu wako uwe rafiki, uwe mlinzi wetu,
Kundi lako ulilinde, tusivutwe na dhambi,
Bwana Yesu tusikie, tukiomba samehe.

Umetuahidi kwamba utakubali watu,
Utawahurumia na, utawapa neema,
Bwana Yesu tunapenda, kuwa wako mapema.
english_lyrics:
Savior as shepherd, lead us today,
Send us to the pasture, make ready a fence,
Lord Jesus alone, you have drawn us to you.

Just be your friend, be our protector,
Protect your flock, let us not be drawn into sin,
Lord Jesus, hear us, if we ask for forgiveness.

You have promised us that you will accept people,
You will have mercy on them and, you will give them grace,
Lord Jesus we love, that you are early.

title: Msalabani pa Mwokozi
swahili_lyrics:
Msalabani pa Mwokozi, hapo niliomba upozi,
Moyo wangu ulitakaswa, na asifiwe.

Na asifiwe, na asifiwe,
Alinikomboa kwa damu, na asifiwe.

Chini ya mti msumbufu, niliomba utakatifu,
Alinikomboa kwa damu, na asifiwe.

Kwa ajabu ninaokoka, Yesu anakaa moyoni;
Mtini alinifilia, na asifiwe.

Damu ya Yesu ya thamani huniokoa makosani,
Huniendesha wokovuni, na asifiwe.
english_lyrics:
At the cross of the Savior, there I prayed for peace,
My heart was purified, may he be praised.

May he be praised, may he be praised,
He redeemed you with blood, may he be praised.

Beneath the troublesome tree, I prayed for holiness,
He redeemed you with blood, may he be praised.

Miraculously I am saved, Jesus dwells in my heart;
The fig tree bore me, may he be praised.

The precious blood of Jesus saves me from sin,
You lead me to salvation, may He be praised.

title: Mungu Wetu Yeye Mwamba
swahili_lyrics:
Mungu wetu yeye mwamba, kimbilio taabuni,
Msaada penye shida, ulio karibu sana.

Mwamba wetu kutupumzisha, yu kivuli kuburudisha,
Huongoza katika njia, kimbilio taabuni.

Mchana usiku yeye, kimbilio taabuni,
Hivyo hatutaogopa, kwani yu karibu sana.

Iwayo yote Yeye tu, kimbilio taabuni,
Twamjua Yeye mlinzi, aliye karibu sana.

Mungu wetu ficho kwetu, kimbilio taabuni,
Siku zote uwe boma, lililo karibu sana.
english_lyrics:
Our God is a rock, a refuge in trouble,
Troubled help, just around the corner.

Our rock to rest us, is shade to refresh,
It leads in the way, a refuge in trouble.

Day and night he, a refuge in trouble,
So we will not be afraid, because he is very close.

All that is He alone, a refuge in trouble,
We know He is the protector, who is very close.

Our God is a refuge for us, a refuge in trouble,
Always be a boma, very close.

title: Baba Twakujia
swahili_lyrics:
Baba twakujia, uwe msaada,
Uwe kimbilio, twakusihi,
Dunia ni giza, tukitengwa nawe,
Tufariji hapa, Baba yetu.

Baba twakujia, tu dhaifu, na usituache, tusikie.

Salama tulinde, kati ya taabu,
Uwe raha yetu, mashakani.
Roho yasumbuka, Baba tujalie,
Twakuomba sana, tupe nguvu.

Neema utupe, tukubali kwako,
Moyo wetu linda, safarini,
Tuongoe mbele, tupate kushinda,
Na kufika ng’ambo, kule kwako.
english_lyrics:
Father we come to you, be a help,
Be a refuge, we beseech you,
The world is dark, if we are separated from you,
Comfort us here, our Father.

Father, we come to you, just weak, and don't leave us, let us hear.

Safe let us guard, in the midst of trouble,
Be our pleasure, doubts.
The spirit is troubled, Father grant us,
We asked you a lot, give us strength.

Give us grace, let us accept you,
Our heart guard, on the journey,
Let us go forward, that we may win,
And get to the other side, there to you.

title: Usinipite
swahili_lyrics:
Usinipite Mwokozi, unisikie,
Unapozuru wengine, usinipite.

Bwana, Bwana, unisikie,
Unapozuru wengine, usinipite.

Kiti chako cha rehema, nakitazama,
Magoti napiga pale, nisamehewe.

Sina ya kutegemea, ila wewe tu,
Uso wako uwe kwangu, nakuabudu.

Wewe tu u Mfariji, sina mbinguni,
Wala duniani pote, Bwana mwingine.
english_lyrics:
Do not pass me Savior, hear me,
When you visit others, don't pass me.

Lord, Lord, hear me,
When you visit others, don't pass me.

Your mercy seat, I look,
I kneel there, be forgiven.

I have no one to depend on, but only you,
May your face be mine, I adore you.

Only you are the Comforter, I have no heaven,
Nor in all the world, another Lord.

title: Yesu Furaha ya Moyo
swahili_lyrics:
Yesu furaha ya moyo, hazina ya pendo na nuru.
Yote yatupendezayo, yasilinganishwe nawe.

Kweli yako ya daima, wawajibu wakwitao,
Ni siku zote u mwema, kwao wakutafutao.

U Mkate wa Uzima, kupokea ni baraka,
Twanywa kwako u kisima, roho zikiburudika,

Mwokozi twakutamani, kwako roho hutulia,
Twakushika kwa imani, nawe watubarikia.

Yesu, ndiwe kwetu mwanga, tufurahishe daima,
Giza la dhambi fukuza, uwe mwanga wa Uzima.
english_lyrics:
Jesus, the joy of the heart, the treasure of love and light.
All that pleases us, should not be compared to you.

Your eternal truth, they will answer those who come,
You are always good, to those who seek you.

You are the Bread of Life, to receive is a blessing,
Your drink is a well, souls are refreshed,

Saviour, we long for you, in you the soul rests,
We hold on to you in faith, and you bless us.

Jesus, be our light, make us happy always,
Dispel the darkness of sin, be the light of Life.

title: Jina Lake Yesu Tamu Tukilisikia
swahili_lyrics:
Jina lake Yesu tamu, tukilisikia,
Hutupoza tena hamu, hutuondolea.

Roho iliyoumia, kwalo hutibika,
Chakula njaani pia, raha tukichoka.

Jina hili ni msingi, ngao, ngome, mwamba,
Kwa hili napata vingi, kwangu ni akiba.

Yesu, Mchunga, Rafiki, Mwalimu, Kuhani,
Mwanzo, Mwisho, na Amina, mali yangu yote!

Moyo wangu hauwezi, kukusifu kweli,
Ila sifa zangu hizi, Bwana zikubali.
english_lyrics:
His sweet Jesus name, if we hear it,
It no longer cools us down, it takes us away.

A wounded soul, by it is healed,
Food when hungry too, comfort when tired.

This name is foundation, shield, fortress, rock,
For this I get a lot, for me it is savings.

Jesus, Shepherd, Friend, Teacher, Priest,
Beginning, End, and Amen, all mine!

My heart cannot, truly praise you,
But these qualities of mine, may the Lord accept them.

title: Taji Mvikeni
swahili_lyrics:
Taji mvikeni, taji nyingi sana,
Kondoo mwake kitini, Bwana wa mabwana,
Nami tamsifu, kanifia mimi,
Ni Mfalme mtukufu, Bwana wa mbinguni.

Taji mvikeni, Mwana wa Bikira;
Anazovaa kichwani, aliteka nyara,
Shilo wa manabii, Mchunga wa watu,
Shina na tanzu ya Yese, wa Bethlehemu.

Taji mvikeni, Bwana wa Mapenzi;
Jeraha zake ni shani, ni vito vya enzi,
Mbingu haina, hata malaika,
Awazaye kuziona, pasipo kushangaa.

Taji mvikeni, Bwana wa salama,
Kote-kote duniani, vita vitakoma,
Nayo enzi yake, itaendelea,
Chini ya miguu yake, maua humea.
english_lyrics:
A crown on my neck, so many crowns,
His sheep in the hand, Lord of lords,
And I will praise him, even if I die,
He is the glorious King, the Lord of heaven.

Crown in the neck, Son of the Virgin;
Those he wears on his head, he kidnapped,
Shiloh of the prophets, Shepherd of the people,
The branch and branch of Jesse, of Bethlehem.

Crown your neck, Lord of Love;
His wounds are glorious, they are jewels of the ages,
Heaven has no, not even an angel,
Those who see them, are not surprised.

The crown on your neck, Lord of safety,
All over the world, wars will cease,
And his reign, will continue,
Under his feet, flowers grow.

title: Tutokapo Tubariki
swahili_lyrics:
Tutokapo tubariki, utupe kufurahi,
Tuwe na pendo lako, neema ya kushinda.
Nawe utuburudishe, tukisafiri chini.

Twatoa sifa shukrani, kwa neno la Injili,
Matunda yake wokovu, yaonekane kwetu,
Daima tuwe amani, kwa Kweli yako Bwana.

Siku zeku zikizidi, tuzitoe kwa Yesu,
Tuwe na nguvu moyoni, tusichoke njiani,
Hata tutakapoona, Utukufu wa Bwana.
english_lyrics:
When we bless, give us joy,
May we have your love, the grace to overcome.
And refresh us, as we travel down.

We give thanks, for the word of the Gospel,
His fruits of salvation, may be seen to us,
May we always be at peace, with your Truth, Lord.

As your days increase, give them to Jesus,
Let us be strong in heart, let us not be weary on the way,
Until we see, Glory of the Lord.

title: Tena Mwokozi Twalitukuza
swahili_lyrics:
Tena Mwokozi twalitukuza,
Jina lako lenye kupendeza,
Twangojea neno la amani,
Kabla hatujakwenda nyumbani.

Tupe amani njiani mwetu,
Wewe u mwanzo u mwisho wetu,
Dhambini kamwe isiingie,
Midomo ikutajayo wewe.

Utupe amani usiku huu,
Ili gizani kuwe nuru kuu,
Tulinde kwa kuwa kwako Bwana,
Usiku ni sawa na mchana.

Tupe amani ulimwenguni,
Ndiyo dawa yetu majonzini,
Na ikitwita sauti yako,
Tupe amani milele kwako.
english_lyrics:
Again the Savior we glorified,
Your lovely name,
We await the word of peace,
Before we go home.

Give us peace on our way,
You are the beginning and the end of us,
Let sin never enter,
Lips that mention you.

Give us peace tonight,
That there may be great light in the darkness,
Protect us with your presence Lord,
Night is the same as day.

Give us peace in the world,
It is our medicine for sorrow,
And when your voice calls,
Give us eternal peace to you.

title: Jina Lake Yesu Tamu
swahili_lyrics:
Jina lake Yesu tamu, lihifadhi moyoni,
Litakufariji ndugu, enda nalo po pote.

Jina la thamani,
(Jina la ) (thamani)
Tumai la dunia,
Jina la thamani,
(Jina la thamani–tamu)
Furaha ya mbinguni.

Jina la Yesu lafaa, kama ngao vitani,
Majarabu yakisonga, omba kwa jina hili.

Jina hili la thamani, linatufurahisha,
Anapotukaribisha, na tunapomwimbia.

Mwisho wa safari yetu, tutakapomsujudu,
Jina hili tutasifu, furaha ya mbinguni.
english_lyrics:
His sweet Jesus name, keep it in your heart,
It will comfort you brother, take it everywhere.

precious name,
(Name of ) (value)
The hope of the world,
precious name,

Heavenly joy.

The name of Jesus is useful, like a shield in battle,
When trials come, pray in this name.

This precious name, makes us happy,
When he welcomes us, and when we sing to him.

At the end of our journey, when we bow to him,
This name we will praise, the joy of heaven.

title: Yesu Nakupenda
swahili_lyrics:
Yesu nakupenda u mali yangu,
Anasa za dhambi sitaki kwangu,
Na Mwokozi aliyeniokoa,
Sasa nakupenda kuzidi pia.

Moyo umejaa mapenzi tele,
Kwa vile ulivyonipenda mbele,
Uhai wako ukanitolea
Sasa nakupenda kuzidi pia.

Ulipoangikwa msalabani,
Tusamehewe tulio dhambini,
Taji ya miiba uliyoivaa,
Sasa nakupenda kuzidi pia.

Mawanda mazuri na masikani,
Niyatazamapo huko mbinguni,
‘Tasema na taji nitakayovaa,
Sasa nakupenda kuzidi pia.
english_lyrics:
Jesus, I love you, you are mine,
The pleasures of sin I do not want for myself,
And the Savior who saved me,
Now I love you even more.

A heart full of love,
Since you loved me before,
Your life was given to me
Now I love you even more.

When you were crucified,
May we be forgiven who are in sin,
The crown of thorns you wore,
Now I love you even more.

Good fields and poor,
When I look up into the sky,
'We will say and the crown that I will wear,
Now I love you even more.

title: Yesu Unipendaye
swahili_lyrics:
Yesu unipendaye, kwako nakimbilia,
Ni wewe utoshaye, mwovu akinijia.
Yafiche ubavuni, mwako maisha yangu,
Nifishe bandarini, wokoe moyo wangu.

Ngome nyingine sina, nategemea kwako,
Usinitupe Bwana, nipe neema yako,
Ninakuamania, mwenye kuniwezesha,
Shari wanikingia, vitani wanitosha.

Nakutaka Mpaji, vyote napata kwako,
Niwapo mhitaji, utanijazi vyako,
Nao waangukao, wanyonge wape nguvu,
Poza wauguao, uongoze vipofu.

Bwana umeniosha, moyo kwa damu yako,
Neema ya kutosha, yapatikana kwako,
Kwako Bwana naona, kisima cha uzima,
Mwangu moyoni Bwana, bubujika daima.
english_lyrics:
Jesus who loves me, to you I run,
It is you who are full, the evil one coming to me.
Hide in the side, burn my life,
Kill me in the harbor, save my heart.

I have no other castle, I depend on you,
Do not abandon me Lord, give me your grace,
I trust in you, my enabler,
Shari is not enough for me, war is enough for me.

I want you Mpaji, I get everything from you,
If you are in need, fill me with yours,
And those who fall, give strength to the weak,
Comfort the sick, guide the blind.

Lord, you have washed my heart with your blood,
Sufficient grace is available to you,
In you Lord I see, well of life,
My heart, Lord, always pour out.

title: Niimbe Pendo Lake
swahili_lyrics:
Niimbe (niimbe) pendo lake, pendo la (pendo la) Yesu
Bwana, Sababu (Sababu) alitoka, kwa Baba akafa.

Niimbe (niimbe) pendo lake, sifa kuu (sifa kuu) nitatoa,
Akafa (akafa) niwe hai, niimbe pendo lake.

Machozi (machozi) alitoa, ijapo (ijapo) sijalia,
Maombi (maombi) yangu bado, aniombeapo.

Upendo (upendo) mkubwa huo! Dunia (dunia) haijui,
Msamaha (samaha) kwa kosa, kubwa kama langu.

Hapana (hapana) tendo jema, ambalo (ambalo) nilitenda,
nataka (nataka) toka leo, nimwonyeshe pendo.
english_lyrics:
Let me sing (sing) his love, the love (love of) Jesus
The Lord, the Reason (Reason) came out, to the Father he died.

Sing (sing) his love, great praise (great praise) I will give,
He died (died) let me live, let me sing of his love.

Tears (tears) he gave, although (although) I did not cry,
My prayers (prayer) still, when he prays for me.

That great love! The world (the world) does not know,
Forgiveness (pardon) for a mistake, as big as mine.

No (no) good deed, which (which) I did,
I want (I want) from today, to show him love.

title: Ninao Wimbo Mzuri

Ninao wimbo mzuri, tangu kuamini,
Wa Mkombozi mfalme, tangu kuamini.

Tangu kuamini, jina lake ‘tasifu,
Tangu kuamini, nitalisifu jina lake.

Kristo anitosha kweli, tangu kuamini,
Mapenzi yake napenda, tangu kuamini.

Nina ushuhuda sawa, tangu kuamini,
Unalofukuza shaka, tangu kuamini.

Ninalo kao tayari, tangu kuamini;
Nililorithi kwa Yesu, tangu kuamini.
english_lyrics:
I have a good song, since I believe,
Of Mkombozi the king, since believing.

Since believing, his name is 'tifuf,
Since I believe, I will praise his name.

Christ is really enough for me, since I believe,
I love his love, since I believe.

I have the same testimony, since I believe,
You chase doubt, since you believe.

I have it already, since I believe;
What I inherited from Jesus, since believing.

Karibu sana univute, karibu sana daima niwe,

Unilinde nisitengwe nawe.

Karibu sana sina kitu, sina sadaka kwa Bwana Yesu,
Isipokuwa moyo wangu, uutakase katika damu,
Uutakase katika damu.

Karibu sana wewe nami ninafurahi kuacha dhambi,
Anasa zote na kiburi, nipe niliyemsulibisha,
Nipe niliyemsulibisha.

Karibu ssana hata mwisho, hata mbinguni nisimamapo,
Daima dawamu niwepo, nitakapoona uso wako,
Nitakapoona uso wako.
english_lyrics:
So close to pull me, so close always be,
Lord, I want you to hold me, protect me from being separated from you,
Protect me from being separated from you.

I have almost nothing, I have no offering to the Lord Jesus,
Except my heart, cleanse it in blood,

So close to you and I am glad to leave sin,
All luxury and pride, give me whom I crucified,
Give me the one I crucified.

Almost to the end, even to heaven where I stand,
As long as I live, when I see your face,
When I see your face

title: Nipe Habari za Yesu
swahili_lyrics:
Nipe habari za Yesu, kwangu ni tamu sana,
Kisa chake cha thamani, hunipendeza sana,
Jinsi malaika wengi, walivyoimba sifa,
Alipoleta amani, kwa watu wa dunia.

Nipe habari za Yesu, kaza moyoni mwangu,
Kisa chake cha thamani, hunipendeza sana.

Kisa cha alivyofunga, peke yake jangwani,
Jinsi alivyolishinda, jaribu la Shetani,
Kazi aliyoifanya, na siku za huzuni,
Jinsi walivyomtesa; yote ni ya ajabu.

Habari za Msalaba, aliposulubishwa,
Jinsi walivyomzika akashinda kaburi,
Kisa chake cha rehema, upendo wake kwangu,
Aliyetoa maisha, nipokee wokovu.
english_lyrics:
Give me the news of Jesus, it is very sweet to me,
His precious story, pleases me so much,
How many angels, sang praises,
When he brought peace, to the people of the world.

Give me the news of Jesus, tighten my heart,
His precious story, I like it very much.

The story of what he fasted, alone in the desert,
How he overcame Satan's temptation,
The work he did, and the sad days,
How they tortured him; it's all wonderful.

News of the Cross, when he was crucified,
How they buried him won the grave,
His story of mercy, his love for me,
He who gave life, receive my salvation.

title: Nimekombolewa na Yesu
swahili_lyrics:
Nimekombolewa na Yesu, na sasa nimefurahi,
Kwa bei ya mauti yake, mimi ni mtoto wake.

Kombolewa! Nakombolewa na damu,
Kombolewa! mimi mwana wake kweli.

Kukombolewa nafurahi, kupita lugha kutamka,
Kulionyesha pendo lake, mimi ni mtoto wake.

Nitamwona Mfalme wangu, katika uzuri wake,
Ambaye najifurahisha, katika torati yake.

Najua taji imewekwa, mbinguni tayari kwangu,
Muda kitambo atakuja, ili alipo niwepo.
english_lyrics:
I have been redeemed by Jesus, and now I am happy,
For the price of his death, I am his child.

Freed! I am redeemed by blood,
Freed! I'm really his son.

Delivered I rejoice, beyond tongue to utter,
He showed his love, I am his child.

I will see my King, in his beauty,
Whom I delight in, in his law.

I know the crown is laid, in heaven ready for me,
He will come in a while, so that when he is there I will be there.

title: Ni Siku Kuu
swahili_lyrics:
Ni siku kuu, siku ile, ya kumkiri Mwokozi,
Moyo umejaa tele, kunyamaza hauwezi.

Siku kuu! Siku kuu! ya kuoshwa dhambi zangu kuu,
Hukesha na kuomba tu, ananiongoza miguu,
Siku kuu! siku kuu! ya kuoshwa dhambi zangu kuu.

Tumekwisha kupatana, mimi wake, yeye wangu,
Na sasa nitamwandama, nikiri neno la Mungu.

Moyo tulia kwa Bwana, kiini cha raha yako,
Huna njia mbili tena, uwe naye uendako.
english_lyrics:
It is a great day, that day, to confess the Savior,
The heart is full, it cannot be silent.

Great day! Great day! to wash away my great sins,
He only watches and prays, he guides my feet,
Great day! great day! to wash away my great sins.

Tumekwisha kupatana, mimi wake, yeye wangu,
And now I will follow him, confessing the word of God.

Rest your heart in the Lord, the center of your pleasure,
You don't have two options anymore, be with him wherever you go.

title: Pendo Lako Ee Mwokozi
swahili_lyrics:
Pendo lako Ee Mwokozi, hushinda pendo zote,
Kaa nasi ndani yetu, furaha ya mbinguni,
Yesu u rehema tupu, safi na kusamehe,
Mfariji mwenye huzuni, yaondoe machozi.

Roho yako ya upendo, tuma kwa kundi lako,
Hebu tuirithi raha, iliyoahidiwa,
Uondoe moyo mbaya, u mwanzo, tena mwisho,
Timiza imani yetu, ili tuwekwe huru.

Yesu uje kwetu sasa, tupokee huruma,
Rudi kwetu tena kamwe, usituache pekee,
Tungekutukuza leo, pamoja na malaika,
Imba na kutoa sifa, ingia kwa ibada.

Sasa Bwana kazi yako, imalize moyoni,
Takasa hekalu lako, wokovu kamilisha,
Safisha viumbe vyako, katika wakati huu,
Tupumzike toka dhambi, tuingie mbinguni.
english_lyrics:
Your love, O Savior, conquers all loves,
Stay with us in us, heavenly joy,
Jesus is pure mercy, pure and forgiving,
Comforter of the sorrowful, take away the tears.

Roho yako ya upendo, tuma kwa kundi lako,
Let us inherit the promised joy,
Get rid of the bad heart, you are the beginning, again the end,
Fulfill our faith, that we may be set free.

Jesus come to us now, let us receive mercy,
Come back to us never again, don't leave us alone,
We would glorify you today, with the angels,
Imba na kutoa sifa, ingia kwa ibada.

Now Lord, finish your work in the heart,
Sanctify your temple, complete salvation,
Cleanse your creatures, at this time,
Let us rest from sin, let us enter heaven.

title: Nasifu Shani ya Mungu
swahili_lyrics:
Nasifu shani ya Mungu, mweneza bahari,
Muumba pia wa mbingu, jua nyota mwezi,
Ni tukufu yako shani, mtengeza mambo,
Ya nyakati na zamani, yasiyo na mwisho.

Kadiri ya nionayo, ya kusifu Mungu:
Nchi niikanyagayo, na hayo mawingu,
Hakuna hata unyasi, usiokukuza,
Na upepo wavumisha, au kutuliza.

Nami kwa mkono wako, naongozwa sawa,
Ni pato nikusifupo, kukwomba ni dawa,
Umenizingira nyuma, na mbele baraka,
Maarifa ya ajabu, yanishinda mimi.
english_lyrics:
I praise the glory of God, spreader of the sea,
Creator also of the heavens, the sun, the stars, the moon,
It is your glory Shani, you make things,
Of times and past, endless.

As far as I can see, to praise God:
The land I tread, and those clouds,
There is not even grass, that does not grow,
And the wind blows, or calms.

And by your hand, I am led right,
It's the result of my life, begging is medicine,
You surround me behind, and bless me in front,
Amazing knowledge, it overwhelms me.

title: Ati Kuna Mvua Njema
swahili_lyrics:
Kuna mvua ya baraka, Bwana nimesikia,
Unawamwagia wote, bure wanaipata.

Na mimi, Na mimi, Bwana uninyeshee?

Sinipite Baba Mwema, dhambini nimezama,
Rehema ni za daima, Bwana, unioneshe.

Sinipite, Yesu mwema, niwe nawe daima,
Natamani kukwandama, Bwana, unichukue.

Sinipite, Roho Mwema, Mpaji wa uzima,
Nawe shahidi wa wema, Bwana wema unipe.
english_lyrics:
There is a rain of blessings, Lord I have heard,
You pour it on everyone, they get it for nothing.

And me, And me, Lord make it rain for me?

Do not pass the Good Father, I am drowned in sin,
Mercy is eternal, Lord, show me.

Do not pass me, good Jesus, may I always be with you,
I want to stumble, Lord, take me.

Do not pass me by, Good Spirit, Giver of life,
And you are a witness of goodness, Lord give me goodness.

title: Njoo, Roho Mtukufu
swahili_lyrics:
Njoo Roho Mtukufu, uoshe moyo wangu,
Utakase nia yangu, njoo nijaze sassa.

Roho Mtukufu njoo, nijaze sasa,
Utakase nia yangu, njoo nijaze sasa.

Ujalize moyo wangu, ijapo sikuoni,
Nami ninakuhitaji, njoo nijaze sasa.

Nimejaa udhaifu, nainamia kwako,
Roho Mtukufu sasa, nitilie na nguvu.

Unioshe nifariji, niponye nibariki,
Unijaze moyo wangu, ndiwe mwenye uwezo.
english_lyrics:
Come Holy Spirit, wash my heart,
Purify my mind, come and fill me up.

Holy Spirit come, fill me now,
Purify my mind, come fill me now.

Fill my heart, even though I don't see it,
And I need you, come fill me now.

I am full of weakness, I bow down to you,
Holy Spirit now, fill me with strength.

Wash me, comfort me, heal me, bless me,
Fill my heart, you are able.

title: Roho Mtakatifu
swahili_lyrics:
Roho Mtakatifu, kiongozi amini,
Utushike mkono, tulio wasafiri,
Utupe kusikia, sauti ya upole,
“Msafiri fuata, naongoza nyumbani.”

Wewe ndiwe rafiki, msaada karibu,
‘Situache shakani, Na tukiwa gizani,
Utupe kusikia, sauti ya upole,
“Msafiri fuata, naongoza nyumbani.”

Siku zetu za kazi, zikiwa zimekwisha,
Wala hatuna tamaa, ila mbingu na sala,
Utupe kusikia, sauti ya upole,
“Msafiri fuata, naongoza nyumbani.”
english_lyrics:
Holy Spirit, faithful leader,
Hold us by the hand, we who travel,
Give us to hear, a gentle voice,
"Follow the traveler, I lead home."

You are a friend, help near,
'Leave me in doubt, And while we are in the dark,
Give us to hear, a gentle voice,
"Follow the traveler, I lead home."

Our working days, being over,
Wala hatuna tamaa, ila mbingu na sala,
Give us to hear, a gentle voice,
"Follow the traveler, I lead home."

title: Ewe Roho wa Mbinguni
swahili_lyrics:
Ewe Roho wa mbinguni, maombi sikia!
Makao yako yafanye, mioyoni mwetu.

Kama nuru tupenyeze, giza uondoe,
Siri yako tuione, na amani yako.

Kama moto tusafishe, choma dhambi yetu,
Roho zetu ziwe zote, hekalu la Bwana.

Kama umande na uje, utuburudishe,
Moyo mkavu utakuwa, ni wenye baraka.

Kama upepo Ee Roho, katika pentekoste
Ukombozi utangaze, kwa kila taifa.
english_lyrics:
O Heavenly Spirit, hear the prayer!
Make your abode, in our hearts.

Let the light shine in, remove the darkness,
Let us see your secret, and your peace.

As fire cleanse us, burn away our sin,
Roho zetu ziwe zote, hekalu la Bwana.

If the dew comes, refresh us,
A dry heart will be blessed.

Like the wind O Spirit, in pentecost
Redemption will proclaim, to every nation.

title: Furaha Gani
swahili_lyrics:
Furaha gani na ushiriki, nikimtegemea Yesu tu,
Baraka gani tena amani, nikimtegemea Yesu tu.

Tegemea, salama bila hatari,
Tegemea, tegemea Mwokozi Yesu.

Nitaiweza njia nyembamba, nikimtegemea Yesu tu,
Njia ‘tazidi kuwa rahisi, nikimtegea Yesu tu.

Sina sababu ya kuogopa, nikimtegemea Yesu tu,
Atakuwa karibu daima, nikimtegemea Yesu tu.
english_lyrics:
What joy and participation, if I rely only on Jesus,
What a blessing and peace, if I rely only on Jesus.

Reliable, safe without risk,
Tegemea, tegemea Mwokozi Yesu.

I will overcome the narrow path, relying only on Jesus,
The way will become easier, if I rely only on Jesus.

I have no reason to fear, just trusting in Jesus,
He will always be near, I just rely on Jesus.

title: Hakuna Rafiki Kama Yesu
swahili_lyrics:
Hakuna rafiki kama Yesu, hakuna, hakuna,
Tabibu mwingine wa rohoni, hakuna, hakuna.

Yesu ajua shida zetu, daima ataongoza,
Hakuna rafiki kama Yesu, hakuna, hakuna,

Wakati ambapo hapo yeye, hapana, hapana,
Wala giza kututenga naye, hapana, hapana.

Aliyesahauliwa naye, hakuna, hakuna,
Mkosaji asiyempenda, hakuna, hakuna.

Kipawa kama Mwokozi wetu, hakuna, hakuna,
Ambaye atanyimwa wokovu, hakuna hakuna.
english_lyrics:
There is no friend like Jesus, no, no,
Another spiritual healer, none, none.

Jesus knows our problems, he will always guide,
There is no friend like Jesus, no, no,

When there he, no, no,
Nor darkness separate us from him, no, no.

Forgotten by him, no, no,
A sinner who dislikes him, none, none.

Gift as our Saviour, none, none,
Who will be denied salvation, there is no one.

title: Mlimani Pana Mwanga
swahili_lyrics:
Mlimani pana mwanga, mwanga wa jua zuri,
Shambani na baharini, jua tukufu liko,
Mwanga ulio mkubwa, umo moyoni mwangu,
Kwa kuwa Yesu alipo, hapa pana mwangaza.

Mwangaza ulio mzuri, mwanga umo moyoni,
Akiwapo Bwana Yesu, pana mwanga moyoni.

Kama mavazi kikuu, ninavua huzuni,
Nguo nzuri za furaha, umenipa za kuvaa,
Nakuandama rohoni, hata nyumba ya juu,
Iliyopambwa vizuri, katika pendo lako.

Ulinikomboa Yesu, maisha yangu mali,
Vyote ni vyako Mwokozi, daima nikusifu,
Nakuandama rohoni, hata nyumba ya juu,
Iliyopambwa vizuri, katika pendo lako.
english_lyrics:
On the mountain there is light, bright sunlight,
In fields and seas, the glorious sun is,
A great light, is in my heart,
Because Jesus is there, there is light here.

A beautiful light, a light in the heart,
When Lord Jesus is present, there is light in the heart.

Like a great garment, I take off sorrow,
Beautiful clothes of joy, you have given me to wear,
I follow you in spirit, even the upper house,
Beautifully decorated, in your love.

You redeemed me Jesus, my life,
All is yours Saviour, always praise you,
I follow you in spirit, even the upper house,
Beautifully decorated, in your love.

title: Miguuni Pake Yesu
swahili_lyrics:
Miguuni pake Yesu, maneno yake tamu,
Pahali palipo heri, niwepo kila siku.
Miguuni pake Yesu nakumbuka upendo
Na hisani yake kwangu, vimenivuta moyo.

Miguuni pake Yesu, hapa mahali bora,
Pa kuweka dhambi zangu, mahali pa pumziko.
Miguuni pake Yesu, hapa nafanya sala,
Kwake napewa uwezo, faraja na neema.

Unibariki Mwokozi, ni miguuni pako,
Unitazame kwa upendo, nione uso wako.
Nipe Bwana nia yake, ili ionekane,
Nimekaa na Mwokozi, aliye haki yangu.
english_lyrics:
At Jesus' feet, his sweet words,
Where there is happiness, be there every day.
At the feet of Jesus I remember love
And his kindness to me, has drawn my heart.

At the feet of Jesus, here in the best place,
Where to put my sins, a place of rest.
At the feet of Jesus, here I pray,
To Him I am given strength, comfort and grace.

Bless me Savior, it is at your feet,
Look at me with love, let me see your face.
Give me the Lord's will, that it may be seen,
I have sat with the Savior, who is my right.

title: Ni Heri Kifungo
swahili_lyrics:
Ni heri kifungo kinachotufunga,
Mioyo yetu kwa pendo pendo la Kikristo.

Mbele ya Baba tunatoa sala,
Hofu nia masumbufu yetu ni mamoja.

Tunavishiriki matata na shida,
Na mara nyingi twatoa chozi la fanaka.

Tunapoachana moyoni twalia,
Lakini tutakutana mwisho mbinguni.
english_lyrics:
Blessed is the bond that binds us,
Our hearts for love Christian love.

Before the Father we offer prayers,
Fear and concern are the same.

We share troubles and problems,
And often we shed tears.

When we part, we cry in our hearts,
But we will meet at last in heaven.

Ninakupenda zaidi, ya vyote vingine;
Kwani umenipa raha, na amani Bwana.

Nusu haijatangazwa (tangazwa) ya upendo wako,
Nusu haijatangazwa (tangazwa) damu hutakasa
(takasa).

Nakujua u karibu, kuliko dunia,
Kukukumbuka ni tamu, kupita kuimba.

Kweli wanifurahisha, na nitafurahi,

4Itakuwaje Mwokozi, kukaa na wewe,

english_lyrics:
I love you more than anything else;
Because you have given me comfort and peace, Lord.

Half is not announced (announced) of your love,
Half unannounced (announced) blood purifies
(clean).

I know you are closer, than the world,
Remembering you is sweeter than singing.

They really make me happy, and I will be happy,
Without your love I see sadness.
4 What will it be like for the Savior to stay with you,
If in the world we have this happiness?

title: Ninaye Rafiki
swahili_lyrics:
Ninaye rafiki naye, alinipenda mbele,
Kwa kamba za pendo lake, nimefungwa milele,
Aukaza moyo wangu, uache ugeuzi,
Ninakaa ndani yake, Yeye kwangu milele.

Ninaye Rafiki ndiye, aliyenifilia,
Alimwaga damu yake, kwa watu wote pia,
Sina kitu mimi tena, nikiwa navyo tele,
Pia vyote ni amana, ndimi wake milele.

Ninaye Rafiki naye, uwezo amepewa,
Atanilinda mwenyewe, juu ‘tachukuliwa,
Nikitazama mbinguni, hupata nguvu tele,
Sasa natumika chini, kisha juu milele.

Ninaye Rafiki naye, yuna na moyo mwema,
Ni Mwalimu Kiongozi, mlinzi wa daima,
Ni nani wa kunitenga na mpenzi wa mbele?
Kwake nimetia nanga, ndimi wake milele
english_lyrics:
I have a friend with him, he loved me before,
By the cords of his love, I am forever bound,
Strengthen my heart, stop turning,
I dwell in Him, He to me forever.

I have a friend, he is the one who failed me,
He shed his blood, for all people too,
I have nothing anymore, when I have plenty,
Also, everything is a deposit, his tongue forever.

I have a friend with him, power is given to him,
He will protect me himself, above 'I will be taken,
When I look at the sky, I get a lot of strength,
Now I'm used down, then up forever.

I have a friend with him, he has a kind heart,
He is the Leading Teacher, the constant protector,
Who is to separate me from the previous lover?
To him I am anchored, his tongue forever

title: Mungu Awe Nanyi Daima
swahili_lyrics:
Mungu awe nanyi daima, hata twonane ya pili,
Awachunge kwa fadhili, Mungu awe nanyi daima.

Mungu awe nanyi daima, kila wakati wa shida,
Awalinde hifadhini, Mungu awe nanyi daima.

Mungu awe nanyi daima, awabariki na pendo,
Ambalo halina mwisho, Mungu awe nanyi daima.

May God be with you always, until the second two-eighth,
Take care of them kindly, may God be with you always.

Even two-nine up, even two-nine again for him,

May God be with you always, cover you with wings,
Feed them, grow them, may God be with you always,

May God be with you always, in every time of trouble,

May God be with you always, bless you with love,
Which has no end, may God be with you always.

Habari hiyo wimbo wangu, daima nitamsifu Yesu.

That news my song, I will always praise Jesus.

Nipe Biblia nyota ya furaha,wapate nuru wasafirio,

Mwokozi wangu.

my savior

Give me the Bible so I can see the dangers in the world,

Give me the Bible the light of life, the comforter when we are lost,

I like to preach, of what is convenient for me,

title: Nataka nimjue Yesu
swahili_lyrics:
Nataka nimjue Yesu, na nizidi kumfahamu,
Nijue pendo lake tu, wokovu wake kamili.

Zaidi zaidi, nimfahamu Yesu,
Nijue upendo wake, wokovu wake kamili.

Nataka nione Yesu, na nizidi kusikia,
Anenapo kitabuni, kujidhihirisha kwangu.

Nataka tena zaidi, daima kupambanua,
Mapenzi yake nifanye, yale yanayompendeza.

Nataka nikae naye, kwa mazungumzo matamu,
Nizidi kuwaonyesha, wengine wokovu wake.
english_lyrics:
I want to know Jesus, and get to know him more,
I know only his love, his complete salvation.

More and more, I know Jesus,
Let me know his love, his perfect salvation.

I want to see Jesus, and hear more and more,
When he speaks in the book, he reveals himself to me.

I want again more, always discerning,
I should do his will, what pleases him.

I want to sit with him, for sweet conversation,
Let me show them, others, his salvation.

title: Twapanda Mapema
swahili_lyrics:
Twapanda mapema, na mchana kutwa,
Mbegu za fadhili, hata jioni,
Twangojea sasa, siku za kuvuna,
Tutashangilia, wenye mavuno.

Wenye mavuno, wenye mavuno,
Tutashangilia, wenye mavuno,
Wenye mavuno, wenye mavuno,
Tutashangilia, wenye mavuno.

Twapanda mwangani, na kwenye kivuli,
Tusishindwe na baridi na pepo;
Punde itakwisha, kazi yetu hapa,
Tutashangilia, wenye mavuno.

Twapanda kwa Bwana, mbegu kila siku,
Tujapoona taabu na huzuni,
Tuishapo shinda, atatupokea,
Tutashangilia, wenye mavuno.
english_lyrics:
We rose early, and all afternoon,
Seeds of kindness, even in the evening,
We wait now, the harvest days,
We will rejoice, harvesters.

Harvesters, harvesters,
We will rejoice, harvesters,
Harvesters, harvesters,
We will rejoice, harvesters.

We ride in the light, and in the shade,
Let us not succumb to the cold and the wind;
Soon it will be over, our work here,
We will rejoice, harvesters.

We sow to the Lord, seeds every day,
When we see trouble and sorrow,
When we win, he will receive us,
We will rejoice, harvesters.

title: Walio Kifoni
swahili_lyrics:
Walio kifoni nenda waponye,
Uwatoe walio shimoni,
Wanaoanguka uwainue,
Habari njema uwajulishe.

Walio kifoni, waokoeni,
Mwokozi yuko huwangojea

Wajapokawia anangojea,
Awasubiri waje tobani,
Mwokozi hawezi kuwadharau,
Huwasamehe tangu zamani.

Na ndani ya moyo wa mwanadamu,
Huwamo shida tena huzuni,
Lakini kwa Yesu kuna rehema,
Kuwaponya na kuwaokoa.

Walio kifoni nenda waponye,
Kazi ni yetu zawadi iko,
Nguvu kuhubiri Bwana hutoa,
Kwa subira tuwavute sasa.
english_lyrics:
Go heal those who are sick,
Bring out those in the pit,
lift up those who fall,
Good news let them know.

Save those who are dying,
The Savior is waiting for them

When they linger he waits,
He waits for them to come face to face,
The Savior cannot despise them,
He doesn't forgive you from long ago.

And in the heart of man,
There is no more trouble, sadness,
But with Jesus there is mercy,
Heal them and save them.

Go heal those who are sick,
The work is ours, the gift is there,
Power to preach the Lord gives,
With patience let's pull them now.

Usiikatae kazi, yake Bwana,
Ukae tayari, kuifanya kazi,
Uende po pote, Mungu akwitapo,
Nawe utaona, furaha kazini.

Njoo we, usiikatae, Njoo we, uifanye kazi,
Usiikatae kazi yake Bwana, ili hatimaye,
usikatazwe juu.

Usiikatae, kazi yake Bwana,
Kwa nini kawia, fanya kazi leo,
Mavuno meupe, wachache wavuni,
Onyesha furaha, kwa kazi ya Bwana.

Usiikatae kazi, yake Bwana,

Do not refuse the work, the Lord's,
Stay ready, make it work,
Go wherever God calls you,

Do not reject the work of the Lord, so that finally,
do not be forbidden above.

Do not reject it, the work of the Lord,
Why wait, work today,
White harvest, few harvest,
Show joy, for the Lord's work.

Do not refuse the work, the Lord's,
Rejecting love, for you is dangerous,
The hour of mercy, Jesus praying,
Confess your sins, let them be erased from heaven.

title: Leo Ninafikiria
swahili_lyrics:
Leo ninafikiria nchi nzuri, ninayotaka kuiona,
Nisimamapo karibu na Mwokozi, tajini zitakuwa nyota?

Sijui tajini mwangu kama nyota, zitang’aa kila wakati.
Nitakapoamka katika majumba, zitakuwa nyota tajini?

Kwa nguvu za Bwana nitafanya kazi, nitavuta roho za
watu, Ili niwe na nyota katika taji, Bwana anapotupa tunu.

Nitakuwa na furaha nikimwona, kuweka miguuni pake,
Watu waliovutwa kwa ajili ya kazi yangu na roho yake.
english_lyrics:
Today I think of a beautiful country, which I want to see,
When I stand next to the Savior, will the crowns be stars?

I don't know my crown like a star, it will always shine.
When I wake up in the palaces, will they be stars in the crown?

With the strength of the Lord I will work, I will draw the souls of
people, So that I have a star in the crown, when the Lord gives us value.

I will be happy to see him, to lay at his feet,
People attracted to my work and its spirit.

title: Fanyeni Kazi Zenu
swahili_lyrics:
Fanyeni kazi zenu, usiku si mbali,
Kesheni saa zenu, vumilieni,
Kwa Yesu tumikeni, na hiyo Injili,
Sana wahubirini, watu wa mbali.

Fanyeni kazi zenu, giza lasogea,
Na wengi wenzi wenu, wamo gizani,
Msipoteze moja, dakika ni hizi,
Bwana atarejea, mwisho wa kazi.

Fanyeni kazi zenu, hivi jua lachwa:
Wote walio kwenu apenda Mungu
Na sisi tumjuaye na tuwafundishe
Ili Yesu ajaye tumfurahishe.
english_lyrics:
Do your work, the night is not far,
Watch your watches, be patient,
Let Jesus serve you, and that Gospel,
Many preachers, people from far away.

Do your work, the darkness is moving,
And many of your companions are in darkness,
Don't waste one, these are the minutes,
The Lord will return, at the end of the work.

Do your work, like this:
All who are among you love God
And let us who know him teach them
So that Jesus who comes may make us happy.

title: Pengine Siyo Mlimani
swahili_lyrics:
Pengine siyo mlimani, utakaponiita,
Pengine siyo baharini, wala palipo vita,
Lakini unaponiita, na njia siijui,
Bwana nitajibu ni tayari, kwenda uniagizapo.

Ukiwa pamoja nami Bwana, mlimani baharini,
Niende utakaponiita; na fuata uendako.

Pengine leo kuna neno, neno tamu la pendo,
Ambalo Yesu anataka, ninene kwa upole,
Ukiwa pamoja nami Bwana, nitamtafuta leo,
Yule aliyepotea mbali, nitasema upendavyo.

Pahali pako bila shaka, pa kuvuna shambani,
Kazi niwezayo kufanya, kwa Yesu Mkombozi,
Hivi nikikutegemea, kwa kuwa wanipenda,
Mapenzi yako nitayafanya, na niwe upendavyo.
english_lyrics:
Probably not on the mountain, when you call me,
Perhaps not at sea, nor where there is war,
But when you call me, and the way I do not know,
Sir, I will answer that it is ready, go where you order.

When you are with me Lord, on the mountain in the sea,
I will go when you call me; and follow your destination.

Perhaps today there is a word, a sweet word of love,
Which Jesus wants, to grow gently,
If You are with me Lord, I will seek Him today,
The one who is lost far away, I will say what you like.

Undoubtedly your place, where the harvest is in the field,
The work I can do, for Jesus the Redeemer,
If I rely on you, because you love me,
I will do your will, and be what you want.

title: Nimemwona Rafiki
swahili_lyrics:
Nimemwona rafiki, wa thamani kubwa,
Ananipenda kwa ‘pole, kwa pendo amini,
Kuishi kutengwa naye, la, huku siwezi,
Tunakaa pamoja, Bwana nami.

Pengine ninachoka, mimi mdhaifu,
Ndipo ninamtegemea, alivyoalika,
Huniongoza njiani, pahali pa nuru,
Twatembea pamoja Bwana nami.

Namweleza huzuni, mimi mdhaifu,
Vile vinavyosumbua, vinavyopendeza,
Huniagiza kutenda, yanayonipasa,
Twatembea pamoja, Bwana nami.

Ajua natamani, kuwavuta watu,
Hivyo ananipeleka, kutangaza Neno,
Nitangaze pendo lake, kwa nini akafa,
Twahubiri pamoja, Bwana nami.
english_lyrics:
I have seen a friend, of great value,
He loves me with pity, with love, believe me,
To live apart from him, no, while I can't,
We stay together, Lord and me.

Maybe I'm getting tired, weak me,
Then I rely on him, he invited,
You lead me on the way, to the place of light,
We walk with the Lord and me.

I tell him sorrow, I am weak,
Disturbing, pleasant,
He instructs me to do what I should,
We walk together, the Lord and me.

He knows I want to attract people,
So he sends me, to proclaim the Word,
Tell me his love, why he died,
We preach together, the Lord and me.

Napenda kitabu chake, kilichotoka mbinguni,
Barua kwangu ya Bwana, ujumbe wake wa pendo.

Humo ndani ya kitabu, sura ya Yesu naona,
Karatasi zimekuwa, nyayo zake za kiongozi.

Neno lake tamu sana, kama asali naona,
Natamani kulionja, ni mkate wa uzima.

Mapenzi yake mwumbaji, yanafunuliwa humo,
Hazina kuu ya hekima, utajiri wa ajabu.

Mwangaza wa ulimwengu, angaza humo moyoni,

I love his book, which came from heaven,
The Lord's letter to me, his message of love.

There in the book, I see the face of Jesus,
Papers have been, his leader's footsteps.

His word is so sweet, like honey I see,
I want to taste it, it is the bread of life.

His creative will, is revealed in it,
Great treasure of wisdom, wonderful wealth.

Light of the world, shine in the heart,
Be a leader everywhere, a lamp for my steps.

title: Niuonapo Msalaba
swahili_lyrics:
Niuonapo Msalaba, Kristo aliponifia,
Kwangu pato ni hasara, kiburi nakichukia.

Na nisijivune Bwana, ila kwa sadaka yako,
Upuzi sitaki tena, zi chini ya damu yako.

Tazama kichwani kwake, mikononi na miguu,
Huzuni pendo twaona, vyabubujika daima.

Vitu vyote vya dunia, si sadaka ya kutosha,

english_lyrics:
When I see the Cross, when Christ died for me,
For me, income is a loss, I hate pride.

And let me not boast, Lord, except for your offering,
I don't want nonsense anymore, it's under your blood.

Look at his head, hands and feet,
Sadness and love we see, they are always bubbling up.

All the things of the world are not a sufficient offering,
Your love is for me, soul, wealth and life.

title: Piga Panda ya Injili
swahili_lyrics:
Piga panda ya injili, onyesha watu wote,
Ili anayesikia, atubu aokoke.

Piga panda ya injili, uipige kwa nguvu,
Mungu amekuagiza, mateka wawe huru.

Uipige vilimani, kwa kila tambarare,
Pande zote miji yote, isikie injili.

Uipige mipakani, barabarani pia,
Iwatangazie wote, wanaitwa na Baba.

Uipige watu wengi, wataka wawe huru,
Waambie kwamba Yesu, asema “Njoni kwangu.”
english_lyrics:
Spread the gospel, show it to all the people,
That he who hears may repent and be saved.

Hit the gospel panda, hit it hard,
God has commanded you, let the captives be free.

Smite it on the hills, on every plain,
All around all the cities, hear the gospel.

Beat it at the borders, on the road too,
Announce them all, they are called by the Father.

Hit many people, they want to be free,
Tell them that Jesus, says "Come to me."

title: Twendeni Askari
swahili_lyrics:
Twendeni askari watu wa Mungu, Yesu yuko mbele,
tumwandame juu, Ametangulia Bwana vitani,
twende mbele kwani ndiye amini.

Twendeni askari, watu wa Mungu,
Yesu yuko mbele, tumwandame juu.

Jeshi la Shetani likisikia, jina la Mwokozi litakimbia,
Kelele za shangwe zivume pote, ndugu inueni zenu sauti.

Kweli kundi dogo watu wa Mungu, la watakatifu ni letu fungu,
Hatutengwi nao moja imani, tumaini moja na moja dini.

Haya mbele watu nasi njiani, inueni mioyo nanyi sifuni,
Heshima na sifa yake Mfalme. juu hata chini sana zivume.
english_lyrics:
Let's go soldier people of God, Jesus is in front,
let him go up, the Lord has gone before the battle,
let's go forward because he is the one who believes.

Let's go soldiers, people of God,
Jesus is ahead, let's gather him up.

When Satan's army hears, the Savior's name will flee,
Let the shouts of joy resound everywhere, brothers, raise your voices.

english_lyrics:
My spirit wakes up now, immediately strives,
The competition is the Lord's, the prize is the crown.

The voice is God's calling you,
He is the generous one, the crown of life.

The witnesses are many, who see you,

swahili_lyrics:
Umtetee Mungu duniani, ijapo pepo kali zavuma,
Mwambani pekee pana nguvu, dhambi ikilemea.

Tusimame imara katika mwamba,
Mwamba wa Kristo pekee,
Ndipo salamani tutasimama,
Kule kitini pa enzi.

Itetee haki kwa bidii, kwa moyo mnyofu wa imani,
Mwambani pekee utashinda, wingi wa upotovu.

Itetee kweli itadumu, ijapokawia itashinda,
Mwambani pekee pana raha, yaishapo tufani.
english_lyrics:
Defend God on earth, even though strong winds are blowing,
Only the rock is strong, burdened by sin.

Let us stand firm in the rock,
Christ's rock alone,
Then in peace we will stand,
In the handbook of the throne.

Defend justice diligently, with a sincere heart of faith,
Only the rock will prevail, the abundance of corruption.

Defend it, it will last, if it lingers, it will win,
Only the rock is happy, when the storm is over.

title: Cha Kutumaini Sina
swahili_lyrics:
Cha kutumaini sina, ila damu yake Bwana,
Sina wema wa kutosha, dhambi zangu kuziosha.

Kwake Yesu, nasimama,
Ndiye mwamba, ni salama,
Ndiye mwamba, ni salama.

Njia yangu iwe ndefu, yeye hunipa wokovu,
Mawimbi yakinipiga, nguvu zake ndiyo nanga.

Damu yake na sadaka, nategemea daima,
Yote chini yakiisha, Mwokozi atanitosha.

Nikiitwa hukumuni, rohoni nina amani,
Nikivikwa haki yake, sina hofu mbele zake.
english_lyrics:
I have nothing to hope for, but the blood of the Lord,
I am not good enough to wash away my sins.

To Jesus, I stand,
That's the rock, it's safe,
That's the rock, it's safe.

May my way be long, he gives me salvation,
When the waves hit me, its strength is the anchor.

His blood and sacrifice, I always rely on,
When all is gone, the Savior will be enough for me.

When I am called to judgment, I have peace in my soul,
If I am clothed in his righteousness, I have no fear before him.

Wapenzi wa Bwana, ije raha yenu,

Twenenda Zayuni, mji mzuri Zayuni,
Twenenda juu Zayuni,
Ni maskani ya Mungu.

Wasiimbe wao wasioamini,
Watoto wa Mungu ndio, watoto wa Mungu ndio,

Sing songs of joy, sing songs of joy,

Let's go to Zion, beautiful city Zion,
Let us go up to Zion,

Do not sing to them who do not believe,
Children of God yes, children of God yes,
Singing down, singing down.

We see in the spirit, the blessings of God,
We haven't reached heaven, we haven't reached heaven,
To glory, to glory.

When we see him, trouble then,
It becomes the water of life, it becomes the water of life.
Real happiness, real happiness.

title: Kesha Ukaombe
swahili_lyrics:
Kesha ukaombe, panapo nafasi,
Wakati si mwingi, kwa hiyo ukeshe,
Mwili ni dhaifu, adui hodari,
Karibu atakuja, Bwana wa arusi.

Kesha, Omba, Kesha, Omba,
Kesha kaombe gizani, mchana daima kesha.

Fukuza usingizi, fukuza mashaka,
Ahadi ni yako, raha ya milele,
Bwana alikesha, kwa ajili yako,
Jasho lake likawa, matone ya damu.

Yesu umkubali, awe nguvu zako,
Silaha uzivae, adui karibu,
Sasa nafasi iko, isipite bure,
Bila kukawia, Masihi yuaja.
english_lyrics:
Wake up and pray, if there is a chance,
Time is short, so stay awake,
The flesh is weak, the enemy is strong,
He will come soon, the bridegroom.

Watch, Pray, Watch, Pray,
Always pray in the dark, the day is always tomorrow.

Drive away sleep, drive away doubts,
The promise is yours, eternal bliss,
The Lord stayed awake, for you,
His sweat became, drops of blood.

Accept Jesus, let him be your strength,
Put on your armor, the enemy is near,
Now there is a chance, don't let it go in vain,
Without delay, the Messiah is coming.

Tutajenga juu ya mwamba, wa Yesu mwamba wa kale,

Tutajenga juu, (Tutajenga juu ya mwamba mkuu)
Tutajenga juu, (Tutajenga juu ya mwamba mkuu)
Tutajenga juu ya mwamba mkuu, juu yake Yesu.

Wengine katika mawimbi, ya anasa za dhambi.

We will build on, (We will build on the great rock)
We will build on, (We will build on the great rock)
We will build on the great rock, on it Jesus.

Build with thee upon the rock, the only true foundation,

title: Nakaza Mwendo Mbinguni
swahili_lyrics:
Nakaza mwendo mbinguni, kila siku napanda juu,
Naomba nikisafiri, Bwana uniongoze juu.

Bwana uniinue juu, kwa imani hata mbingu,
Juu kuliko dunia, Bwana uniongoze juu.

Moyo wangu hautaki, kukaa palipo shaka,
Wengine wapenda chini, nia yangu ni kupanda.

Nataka kupanda juu, nisishindwe na adui,
Kwa imani nasikia, sauti ya washindaji.

Kupanda juu nataka, niuone utukufu,
Hata mwisho nitaomba, Bwana uniongoze juu.
english_lyrics:
I press on to heaven, every day I climb higher,
I pray that when I travel, the Lord will lead me up.

Lord lift me up, with faith to heaven,
Higher than the earth, Lord lead me up.

My heart does not want, to dwell in doubt,
Others like to go down, my intention is to go up.

I want to climb up, not to be defeated by the enemy,
By faith I hear, the voice of the conquerors.

I want to go up, see the glory,
Even at the end I will pray, Lord lead me up.

title: Niambie Ee Mlinzi
swahili_lyrics:
Niambie Ee mlinzi, je, kumepambazuka ,
Utukufu wa Zayuni, pana dalili zake?
Msafiri uondoke, utazame mbinguni,
Kiunoni ujifunge, ni kucha alfajiri.

Mlinzi, inamulika, nuru njiani mwako,
Dalili za kuja kwake, kwamba siku karibu,
Panda itakapolia, itawaamsha wafu,
Watakatifu wa Mungu, kuwapa kutokufa.

Mlinzi ione nuru, ya mwaka wa Sabato,
Sauti zinatangaza, ufalme ni karibu,
Msafiri ninaona, mlima wa zayuni,
Mji wa Yerusalemi, nayo fahari yake.

Kwenye mji wa dhahabu, anaketi Mfalme,
Katika kiti kizuri, huku anatawala,
Pana amani po pote, mashamba husitawi,
Na ardhi ina rutuba; mito ni mitulivu.

Mlinzi twakaribia, nchi iliyo nzuri,
Twende mbele tufurahi, nchi inachangamka,
Sikieni kuna wimbo, wa waliookoka,
Kaza mwendo ujiunge, na kundi kubwa hili.
english_lyrics:
Tell me, O watchman, is it dawn,
The glory of Zion, are there signs of it?
Traveler depart, look to heaven,
Gird your waist, it's dawn.

Guardian, shining, light on your path,
The signs of his coming, that the day is near,
When the plant cries, it will wake the dead,
Saints of God, give them immortality.

Let the watchman see the light, of the Sabbath year,
Voices proclaim, the kingdom is near,
A traveler I see, Mount Zion,
The city of Jerusalem, and its pride.

In the city of gold, sits the King,
In a good seat, while he reigns,
There is peace everywhere, fields flourish,
And the land is fertile; rivers are still.

Guard we come near, good land,
Let's go forward and be happy, the country is excited,
Hear there is a song, of the survivors,
Hurry up and join this great group.

title: Msingi Imara
swahili_lyrics:
Msingi imara ninyi wa Bwana,
Umewekwa kwenu kwa neno lake,
Nini zaidi atasema Bwana,
Imani yenu ipate kuzidi?

Wambiwapo vuka maji ya giza,
Mito ya mashaka haitazidi,
Takuwapo nawe nikuwezeshe,
Shida upatazo zisikutishe,

Utakapopishwa ndani ya moto,
Nguvu nitakupa, upate pato,
Huteketezwi ila taka zako,
Na zitasalia dhahabu zako.

Na mtu aliyenitegemea,
Nguvu za Jehanamu zijapotisha,
Kamwe kwa adui sitamtia,
Mtu wangu kamwe sitamuacha.
english_lyrics:
You firm foundation of the Lord,
It is assigned to you by his word,
What more will the Lord say,
May your faith increase?

When you are told to cross the dark waters,
The rivers of doubt will not overflow,
We will be there with you and I will enable you,
Don't let the problems you find scare you,

When you are roasted in the fire,
I will give you strength, you will gain,
Nothing but your waste is burned,
And your gold will remain.

And someone who trusted me,
When the powers of Hell threaten,
Never to the enemy will I put him,
I will never leave my man.

title: Mrithi Ufalme
swahili_lyrics:
Mrithi ufalme kwani walala?
Karibu wokovu wasinzia?
Amka simama uvae silaha,
Haraka sana saa zapita.

Mrithi ufalme mbona ‘kawia?
Mbona hupokei zawadi?
Haya uvae Mwokozi yuaja,
Haraka umlaki afikapo.

Mataifa makuu ya dunia,
Yapigana na kujiangusha,
Usizihofu dalili, mrithi,
Ishara zote hazikawii.

Sitazame anasa za dunia,
Kwani hayo yapita upesi,
Zivunje kamba zinazokufunga,
Mrithi ufalme njoo karudi.

Inua kichwa tazama mbele tu,
Mfalme aja na utukufu,
Jua laonekana milimani,
Warithi ufalme furahini.
english_lyrics:
The heir to the kingdom, why are they sleeping?
Almost salvation sleepy?
Arise, stand up and put on your armor,
Fast forward to the last hour.

Heir to the kingdom, why is he 'slow?'
Why don't you receive gifts?
Here, put on the Savior is coming,
Quickly meet him when he arrives.

Great nations of the world,
They fight and fall,
Fear not the signs, heir,
All signs are not delayed.

I will not look at the pleasures of the world,
Because that will soon pass,
Break the chains that bind you,
Heir to the kingdom come back.

Keep your head up and look straight ahead,
The king comes with glory,
The sun appears in the mountains,
Heirs of the kingdom rejoice.

title: Je! Mlinzi Ukutani
swahili_lyrics:
Je mlinzi ukutani, wa mji wa Zayuni,
Habari zake usiku, asubuhi karibu?
Kuna dalili za kupambazuka?
Kuna dalili za kupambazuka?

Katika safari yetu, twaona nchi kavu?
Tutalala baharini, bandari bado mbali?
Kweli kweli, tutaona ufalme?
Kweli kweli, tutaona ufalme?

Tunaona nuru yake, nyota ya asubuhi,
Nyota tukufu na safi, inang’aa mbinguni,
Furahini, wokovu u karibu,
Furahini, wokovu u karibu.

Tumetazama ramani, kweli pwani si mbali,
Twende mbele, kwa upesi tutaona bandari,
Furahani, imbeni nyimbo zenu,
Furahani, imbeni nyimbo zenu.
english_lyrics:
Is the guard on the wall, of the city of Zion,
What's up at night, next morning?
Are there signs of dawn?
Are there signs of dawn?

On our journey, do we see dry land?
We will sleep in the sea, the port is still far?
Really, will we see the kingdom?
Really, will we see the kingdom?

We see his light, the morning star,
A glorious and pure star, shining in the sky,
Rejoice, salvation is near,
Rejoice, salvation is near.

We have looked at the map, the coast is really not far,
Let's go ahead, soon we will see the harbor,
Rejoice, sing your songs,
Rejoice, sing your songs.

title: Mpaka Lini Bwana
swahili_lyrics:
Mpaka lini Bwana, utakaa mbali?
Kumetuchosha moyo, kukawia hivi,
Utatujia lini, ili tufurahi,
Katika ile nuru, kuja kutukufu?

Mpaka lini Yesu, utaacha watu,
Uliowakomboa, wawe na mashaka?
Wachache waamini, kwamba utarudi,
Wachache wa tayari, Bwana kukulaki.

Waamshe watu wako, tangaza ujumbe,
“Mwe watakatifu, Bwana yu karibu,”
Utatujia lini, ili tufurahi,
Katika ile nuru, kuja kutukufu?
english_lyrics:
How long, Lord, will you stay away?
We are tired of lingering like this,
When will you come to us, that we may rejoice,
In the light, come to glory?

How long, Jesus, will you leave people,
You who freed them, should they have doubts?
Few believe, that you will return,
A few are ready, the Lord will meet you.

Wake up your people, proclaim the message,
"Holy ones, the Lord is near,"
When will you come to us, that we may rejoice,
In the light, come to glory?

Nataka imani hii, imani imara,
Ambayo haitetemi kitu chote wakati wa shida,
Wakati wa shida.

Isiyonung’unikia, huzuni taabu;
Lakini katika saa ya matata humwamini Mungu,
Humwamini Mungu.

Imani inayong’aa, katika tufani,
Isiyoogopa giza wala shida njaa na hatari,
Njaa na hatari.

Haiogopi dunia, kudharau kwake,
Haiangushwi na hila, nayo dhambi na udanganyifu,
Na udanganyifu.

Bwana nipe imani hii, hivi nitaweza
Kuonja hapa chini ulimwenguni kurithi furaha,

english_lyrics:
I want this faith, strong faith,
Which shakes nothing in time of trouble,
Time of trouble.

Uncomplaining, sorrowful misery;
But in the hour of trouble you believe in God,
You don't believe in God.

Faith that shines, in the storm,
Not afraid of darkness or hardship, hunger and danger,
Hunger and danger.

It does not fear the world, its contempt,
It is not brought down by trickery, nor by sin and deceit,
And deception.

Lord, give me this faith, this way I can do it
Tasting here below in the world to inherit joy,
Inherit happiness.

swahili_lyrics:
Tupe moto wa uhai, uliowaka zamani,
Uliowaongoza juu, wazee watakatifu.

Wapi roho iliyokaa, moyoni mwa Ibrahimu?
Kadhalika ndugu Paulo, aliwezeshwa na moto.

Kwani neema haina, nguvu siku hizi sawa,
Kama wakati wa Musa, Ayubu na wa Eliya?

Zamani za kale Bwana, kumbuka na kwa rehema,
Zihuishe roho zetu, kwa Roho Mtakatifu.
english_lyrics:
Give us the fire of life, that burned long ago,
You led them up, holy elders.

Where is the spirit in Abraham's heart?
Likewise brother Paul, he was empowered by fire.

Because grace has no power these days,
Like the time of Moses, Job and Elijah?

Long ago Lord, remember and mercifully,
Revive our souls, with the Holy Spirit.

title: Siku Sita Zimepita
swahili_lyrics:
Siku sita zimepita, Sabato tena karudi,
Shangilie roho yangu, itukuze kwa busara.

Msifuni awapaye, pumziko tamu wachovu,
Kwake roho yatulizwa, kupita siku nyingine.

Moyo wetu ufurahi, na kutoa shukurani,
Ujalizwe raha ile, yasiyopitika kamwe.

Raha hiyo ya rohoni, ni amana ya pumziko,
Ambalo limewekwa juu, kikomo cha masumbuko.
english_lyrics:
Six days have passed, the Sabbath again,
Rejoice my soul, glorify it wisely.

Praise him who gives, sweet rest to the weary,
For him the soul will be calmed, to pass another day.

Let our hearts rejoice, and give thanks,
May you be filled with that pleasure, which will never pass.

That spiritual pleasure is a deposit of rest,
The higher it is, the higher the limit.

title: Ni Siku ya Furaha
swahili_lyrics:
Ni siku ya furaha, ni siku ya nuru,
Nasi twaona raha, kuja kushukuru,
Leo watu wa Mungu, wadogo wakubwa,
Hukaribia mbingu, ilipo baraka.

Leo ndiyo bandari, nasi twawasili,
Hiyo bustani nzuri, ya nyingi fadhili,
Kijito cha baridi, kimefanya ziwa,
Na kiu ikizidi, twanywa maridhawa.

Leo ngazi na iwe, ifikayo juu,
Mawazo na yasiwe, ya duniani tu,
Leo ni kujilisha, chakula cha mbingu,
Na kujifurahisha, kwa mambo ya Mungu.
english_lyrics:
It is a day of joy, it is a day of light,
And we see pleasure, come to thank,
Today the people of God, young and old,
It approaches heaven, where there is blessing.

Today is the port, and we arrive,
That beautiful garden, of many kindnesses,
The cold stream, has made a lake,
And if the thirst increases, we drink the reward.

Today the ladder may be, reaching the top,
Thoughts should not be, only of the world,
Today is feeding, the food of heaven,
And enjoy yourself, for the things of God.

title: Ewe Skuli ya Sabato
swahili_lyrics:
Ewe shule ya Sabato, u pazuri sana,
Moyo wangu wanivuta, nije kwako leo.

Sabato, ni nzuri, Sabato, ni nzuri,
Moyo wangu wanivuta, nije kwako leo.

Moyo wangu mpotovu, hapa una raha,
Ndipo nimwonapo Yesu, nije kwako leo.

Hapa Yesu mwenye pendo, aniita pole,
Nimtolee moyo Yeye, nije kwako leo.
english_lyrics:
O Sabbath school, you are very good,
My heart pulls me, come to you today.

Sabbath, it is good, Sabbath, it is good,
My heart pulls me, come to you today.

My wayward heart, here is pleasure,
Then when I see Jesus, I will come to you today.

Here is loving Jesus, calling me sorry,
Let me give heart to Him, come to you today.

title: Ikumbuke Kote Sabato
swahili_lyrics:
Ikumbuke kote, Sabato ya Bwana,
Siku tamu na bora, kupita nyingine,
Yatuletea raha, na furaha kweli,
Mwanga wake hung’aza, urembo wa Yesu.

Karibie karibie, Sabato tamu,
Karibie Yesu pia, Bwana wa raha.

Itakase kweli, ukamsifu leo,
Yeye aliyesema, “Mimi ndiye njia,”
Nasi tukimfuata, Mkombozi hapa,
Atatunywesha tele, maji ya uzima.

Siku ya nderemo, tupishe wakati,
Tukimwimbia Yesu, rafiki mpendwa,
Mponya wetu leo, u mwema ajabu,
Ukae kwetu Bwana, moyoni daima.
english_lyrics:
Remember it everywhere, the Sabbath of the Lord,
A sweet and better day, passing another,
It brings us pleasure, and true happiness,
Its light shines, the beauty of Jesus.

Welcome welcome, sweet Sabbath,
Welcome Jesus too, Lord of pleasure.

Sanctify it indeed, praise him today,
He who said, "I am the way,"
And if we follow him, the Redeemer here,
He will give us plenty to drink, the water of life.

On the day of the storm, give us time,
Singing to Jesus, dear friend,
Our healer today, you are amazingly good,
Stay with us Lord, always in our hearts.

title: Salama Tumepita
swahili_lyrics:
Salama tumepita, safarini juma hii,
Tumwendee Mwokozi, atubariki sasa,
Siku hiyo ya raha, siku bora ya juma,
Siku hiyo ya raha, siku bora ya juma.

Utupe nuru leo toka hazina yako,
Ondoa dhambi zetu, tupokee na pendo,
Mikono yapumzika, tuishi ndani yako,
Mikono yapumzika, tuishi ndani yako.

Twakusanyika hapa, tusifu jina lako,
Ukaribie kwetu, tupe neema Bwana,
Utamu tusikize, wa raha ya milele,
Utamu tusikize, wa raha ya milele.

Injili yako leo, ishike wenye dhambi,
Itupe nguvu nyingi, iponye wenye shida,
Mioyo yetu shangaza, vyakula utulishe,
Mioyo yetu shangaza, vyakula utulishe.
english_lyrics:
Hello we have passed, on the road this week,
Let us go to the Savior, bless us now,
That pleasant day, the best day of the week,
That happy day, the best day of the week.

Give us light today from your treasure,
Take away our sins, receive us with love,
Hands rest, let us live in you,
Hands rest, let us live in you.

We gather here, praise your name,
Come close to us, give us grace, Lord,
Sweetness let us hear, of eternal pleasure,
Sweetness let us hear, of eternal pleasure.

Your gospel today, catch sinners,
Give us great strength, heal the afflicted,
Our hearts wonder, food to feed us,
Our hearts wonder, food feed us.

title: Ukaribie Tena
swahili_lyrics:
Ukaribie tena, ewe siku ya raha,
Roho yakusalimu, kama mwanga wa mbingu.

Raha yako tulivu, yafurahisha moyo,
Yatuliza taabu, hata waisha mwendo.

Ee siku takatifu, ya sifa na maombi,
Na kutuhekimisha, baraka yako kubwa.
english_lyrics:
Come again, O day of pleasure,
The spirit greeted you, like the light of heaven.

Your quiet pleasure, gladdens the heart,
It calms the trouble, until they stop moving.

O holy day, of praise and prayer,
And judge us, your great blessing.

title: Siku ya Sabato
swahili_lyrics:
Siku ya Sabato, siku takatifu,
Watu wako Mungu wetu, waipenda sana.

Uliitakasa, uliibariki,
Siku hiyo ya Sabato, siku yako Bwana.

Nasi tubariki, tukikuabudu,
Katika siku ya raha, siku yako Bwana.

Halafu mbinguni, pamoja na Wewe,
Tunataka kuzishika, Sabato za Bwana.
english_lyrics:
The Sabbath day, the holy day,
People are our God, they love him very much.

You sanctified it, you blessed it,
That Sabbath day is your Lord's day.

And bless us, worshiping you,
In the day of pleasure, your day is the Lord.

Then in heaven, with You,
We want to keep them, the Lord's Sabbaths.

title: Siku Hii ya Sabato
swahili_lyrics:
Siku hii ya Sabato, tamu kufikiri,
Juu ya Mungu na mbingu, kuacha dunia.

Tamu kusikia neno, toka mhubiri
Anayefundisha toba, tupate uzima.

Katika vita na dhambi, ikiwa twashindwa,
Yeye atatupa nguvu, aonaye moyo.
english_lyrics:
This Sabbath day, sweet to think,
On God and heaven, leave the earth.

Sweet to hear the word, from the preacher
He who teaches repentance, may we have life.

In the battle with sin, if we fail,
He will give us strength, who sees the heart.

title: Bwana Asubuhi
swahili_lyrics:
Bwana asubuhi kucha, nitakuinua,
Sauti yangu kuomba, nipate baraka.

Nakuomba roho yako, niongozwe nayo,
Nifanye yanipasayo, na mapenzi yako.

Wanaokutegemea, u Mlinzi wao,
Matumaini wanayo, utayatimiza.

Na kwa wingi wa fadhili, nyumbani mwako juu,
Nitaingia na wimbo, pale kusujudu.
english_lyrics:
Lord all morning, I will lift you up,
My voice to pray, may I be blessed.

I ask your spirit, guide me with it,
Do what I should, and your will.

Those who rely on you, you are their Protector,
The hopes they have, you will fulfill them.

And with abundance of kindness, in your house above,
I will enter with a song, there to bow down.

title: Mapya Ni Mapenzi
swahili_lyrics:
Mapya ni mapenzi hayo,, asubuhi tuonayo,
Saa za giza hulindwa, kwa uzima kuamka.

Kila siku mapya pia, rehema wema na afya,
Wokovu na msamaha, mawazo mema furaha.

Tukijitahidi leo, na mwendo utupasao,
Mungu atatueleza, yatakayompendeza.

Mambo yetu ya dunia, Bwana atayang’aria,
Matata atageuza, yawe kwetu ya baraka.

Yaliyo madogo haya, Bwana tukimfanyia,
Yatosha tutafaidi, huvuta kwake zaidi.

Ewe Bwana siku zote, tusaidie kwa yote,
Mwendo wetu wote vivyo, uwe kama tuombavyo.
english_lyrics:
New is that love,, in the morning we see it,
The hours of darkness are guarded, for life to awaken.

Every new day too, mercy goodness and health,
Salvation and forgiveness, good thoughts happy.

If we strive today, and the pace we should,
God will explain to us, what will please him.

Our worldly affairs, the Lord will shine,
Matata will change, may it be a blessing for us.

These little things, if we do them to the Lord,
It is enough that we will benefit, it attracts more.

O Lord always, help us in all things,
All our behavior is the same, let it be as we pray.
