title: Kaa Nami
swahili_lyrics:
Kaa nami, ni usiku tena, usiniache gizani, Bwana,
Msaada wako haukomi, nili peke yangu, kaa nami.

Siku zetu hazikawi kwisha, sioni la kunifurahisha,
Hakuna ambacho hakikomi, usiye na mwisho kaa nami.

Nina haja nawe kila saa, sina mwingine wa kunifaa,
Mimi nitaongozwa na nani, ila wewe Bwana kaa nami.

Sichi neno uwapo karibu, nipata lo lote si taabu,
Kifo na kaburi haviumi, nitashinda kwako kaa nami.

Nilalapo nikuone wewe, gizani mote nimulikiwe,
Nuru za mbinguni hazikomi, siku zangu zote, kaa nami.
english_lyrics:
Stay with me, it's night again, don't leave me in the dark, Lord,
Your help never stops, I am alone, stay with me.

Our days don't end, I don't see anything to make me happy,
There is no end, no end, stay with me.

I need you every hour, I have no one else to suit me,
Who will I be guided by, but you Lord stay with me.

I don't need a word if you are near, I will find anything and not trouble,
Death and the grave do not hurt, I will win for you stay with me.

When I sleep, I see you, in the dark, let me be enlightened,
The lights of heaven do not stop, all my days, stay with me.

title: Magharibini Jua
swahili_lyrics:
Magharibini jua, limekwisha kushuka,
Mwezi na nyota sasa, vinamsifu muumba wa usiku .

Mungu Mtukufu, Mungu mkuu,
Wote juu mbinguni, na wanadamu chini twakusifu.

Mpaji wa uhai, ukaaye mbinguni,
Utuhifadhi sisi, tufahamu gizani u karibu.

Mapenzi yako makuu, yawe nasi usiku,
Tuli usingizini, kucha vivyo rohoni tushukuru.

Na utakapokuja, na nguvu kutawala,
Mungu wangu kubali, kunipeleka mimi uliko juu.

Baba Mwana Roho, Mungu wetu,
Wote juu mbinguni, na wanadamu chini twakusifu.
english_lyrics:
In the west the sun, has gone down,
The moon and the stars now praise the creator of the night.

Great God, great God,
All above in heaven, and men below praise you.

Giver of life, who dwells in heaven,
Save us, let us know in the dark that you are near.

Your great love, be with us at night,
While we are asleep, let us be thankful in the spirit.

And when you come, with power to rule,
My God accept, take me to the top.

Father Son Spirit, our God,
All above in heaven, and men below praise you.

title: Jua la Rohoni Mwangu
swahili_lyrics:
Jua la rohoni mwangu, mpendwa Mwokozi wangu,
Usiku giza hapana, ukiwa karibu Bwana.

Nikipata usingizi, nijaze fikara hizi,
Ni tamu sana, nilale pendoni mwako milele.

Kaa nami ewe Bwana, usiku kama mchana,
Nisiishi mbali nawe, ni uhai kuwa nawe.

Kama mtoto mnyonge, ameshawishwa atange,
Mtafute ewe Bwana, ujirudishie tena.

Wagonjwa wape amani, waneemeshe maskini,
Waliao, Mtulizi, wape wote usingizi.

Asubuhi tutokapo, tukaribie tulipo,
Twingiapo duniani, tuwe mwako mkononi.
english_lyrics:
The sun of my soul, my dear Saviour,
There is no dark night, when you are close to the Lord.

When I fall asleep, fill me with these thoughts,
It's so sweet, let me sleep in your love forever.

Be with me, O Lord, night as day,
I should not live away from you, it is life to be with you.

Like a poor child, urged to start,
Seek him, O Lord, and return to yourself again.

Give peace to the sick, bless the poor,
Those who sleep, Mtulizi, give them all sleep.

In the morning where we are, let us approach where we are,
When we enter the world, let us be in the hand.

title: Po pote Mashamba Yajaa
swahili_lyrics:
Po pote mashamba yajaa, tele nafaka pevu,
Po pote yang’aa meupe, bondeni na nyandani.

Mwenye mavuno twasihi, upeleke wavuni,
Wayakusanye mazao, hata kazi yaishe.

Wapeleke uchaoni, waende na jotoni,
Hata jua lishukapo, wakusanye ko kote.

Enyi wakazi wa bwana, yaleteni mazao,
Na jioni ingieni, kwake na furaha kuu.
english_lyrics:
Everywhere the fields are full, full of ripe grain,
Everywhere it shines white, in the valley and in the fields.

He who has a harvest, we beseech you, send it to the reapers,
Let them gather the crops, until the work is done.

Send them to the light, go with the heat,
Even when the sun goes down, gather around.

Ye inhabitants of the lord, bring forth crops,
And in the evening come, to him with great joy.

title: Sikieni Neno
swahili_lyrics:
Sikieni neno la Mungu wetu, zileteni zaka kwa hazina
Leteni na mioyo yenu yote, mibaraka itakuja.

Zileteni zaka kwa hazina, kanijaribu sasa nazo,
Nitakupeni mibaraka, zaidi ya nafasi ya kupewa.

Wataka Roho Mtakatifu kwako? Uzilete zaka kwa hazina
Ukae karibu na Bwana wako, ndipo utabarikiwa.

Je, una kasoro na Bwana wako? Uzilete zaka kwa hazina,
Uzilete kama alivyosema, ndipo utabarikiwa.

Ushukuru Bwana na moyo wote, unapoleta zaka ghalani,
Usadiki ahadi zake zote, ndipo utabarikiwa.

Tuimbe sote nyimbo za furaha, tunapoleta zaka ghalani,
Tuimbe kabisa na furaha kubwa, kwani tutabarikiwa.
english_lyrics:
Hear the word of our God, bring tithes to the treasury
Bring it with all your heart, blessings will come.

Bring tithes to the treasury, tempt me now with them,
I will give you blessings, more than opportunity.

Do you want the Holy Spirit? Bring tithes to the treasury
Stay close to your Lord, then you will be blessed.

Do you have a problem with your Lord? Bring tithes to the treasury,
Bring them as he said, and you will be blessed.

Thank the Lord with all your heart, when you bring tithes to the barn,
Believe all his promises, then you will be blessed.

Let us all sing songs of joy, when we bring tithes to the barn,
Let us sing with great joy, because we will be blessed.

title: Mali Yako Sasa
swahili_lyrics:
Mali yako sasa, Bwana, tunatoa,
Hatuna yaliyo yetu, yote ni vipaji.

Sisi watumishi, twaungama deni,
Tungeirudisha kwake, iliyo ya Bwana.

Utusaidie, upendo kujua,
Kwa ajili yao wote, walio gizani.

Neno tumaini, na kutegemea,
Kwamba lote tufanyalo, tulifanye kwako.
english_lyrics:
Thine now, Lord, we give,
We don't have what we have, it's all talents.

We servants, confess the debt,
We would return it to him, which belongs to the Lord.

Help us, love to know,
For all of them, who are in darkness.

The word hope, and rely on,
That whatever we do, we do it for you.

title: Sioshwi dhambi Zangu
swahili_lyrics:
Sioshwi dhambi zangu, bila damu yake Yesu,
Hapendezewi Mungu, bila damu yake Yesu.

Hakuna kabisa, dawa ya makosa,
Ya kututakasa, ila damu yake Yesu.

La kunisafi sina, ila damu yake Yesu,
Wala udhuru tena, ila damu yake Yesu.

Sipati patanishwa, bila damu yake Yesu,
Hukumu yanitisha, bila damu yake Yesu.

Sipati tumaini, bila damu yake Yesu,
Wema wala amani, bila damu yake Yesu.

Yashinda ulimwengu, hiyo damu yake Yesu,
Na kutufikisha juu, hiyo damu yake Yesu.
english_lyrics:
My sins are not washed away, without the blood of Jesus,
He is not pleasing to God, without the blood of Jesus.

Absolutely no, wrong medicine,
To cleanse us, but the blood of Jesus.

I have nothing to cleanse me, but the blood of Jesus,
No more excuse, but the blood of Jesus.

I cannot be reconciled, without the blood of Jesus,
Judgment scares me, without the blood of Jesus.

I have no hope, without the blood of Jesus,
Goodness or peace, without the blood of Jesus.

Overcome the world, the blood of Jesus,
And bring us to the top, the blood of Jesus.

title: Nilikupa Wewe
swahili_lyrics:
Nilikupa wewe, damu ya moyoni,
Ili wokolewe, winuke ufuni.

Nimekunyima ni wewe? Umenipa nini?
Nimekunyima ni wewe? Umenipa nini?

Nilikupa miaka yangu duniani,
Upate inuka, kuishi mbinguni.

Nimekuletea, huku duniani,
Pendo na wokovu, vyatoka mbinguni.

Nipe siku zako, udumu mwangani,
Na taabu yako, wingie rahani.

Nafsi nafsi pendo mali, twae Imanweli.
Nafsi nafsi pendo mali, twae Imanweli.
english_lyrics:
I gave you, heart's blood,
To be saved, rise up.

I denied you, is it you? What did you give me?
I denied you, is it you? What did you give me?

I gave you my years on earth,
May you rise, live in heaven.

I have brought you, here on earth,
Love and salvation, come from heaven.

Give me your days, stay in the light,
And your misery, be filled with peace.

Soul, soul, love, property, marry Immanuel.
Soul, soul, love, property, marry Immanuel.

title: Twende kwa Yesu
swahili_lyrics:
Twende kwa Yesu mimi nawe, njia atuonya tuijue,
Imo chuoni na mwenyewe, hapa asema njoo,

Na furaha tutaiona, mioyo ikitakata sana,
Kwako Mwokozi kuonana, na milele kukaa.

“Wana na waje,” atwambia, furahini kwa kusikia,
Ndiye Mwokozi wetu hasa, na tumtii njoni.

Wangojeani? Leo yupo, sikiza sana asemapo,
Huruma zake zitwitapo, ewe kijana njoo.
english_lyrics:
Let's go to Jesus, you and I, the way he warns us to know,
I'm in college with myself, here he says come,

And we will see it with joy, hearts breaking so much,
For you Savior to see each other, and forever to stay.

"Sons and come," he tells them, be happy to hear,
He is our Savior in particular, and we must obey him.

What are you waiting for? Today he is there, listen carefully to what he says,
When his compassion calls, oh boy, come.

title: Kuwatafuta
swahili_lyrics:
Kuwatafuta wasioweza, kuomba wamrejee Yesu,
Kuwaambia maneno yake “Njooni kwangu nawapenda.”

Nitakwenda (Nitakwenda) niwatafute wapotevu
(wapotevu) wageuke, waingie (Waingie) katika zizi
la Mwokozi (la Mwokozi)Yesu Kristo.

Kuwatafuta wasioweza, waonyeshwe Mwokozi wetu,
Kuwaongoza wapate wote, uzima ule wa milele.

Kazi hiyo nataka kufanya, leo nimesikia mwito,
Kuwainua waangukao, waletwe kwake Yesu njia.
english_lyrics:
Seeking those who cannot, asking them to return to Jesus,
To tell them his words "Come to me I love you."

I will go (I will go) to look for the lost
(losers) turn, enter (enter) the fold
of the Savior (of the Savior) Jesus Christ.

Seeking those who cannot, be shown our Savior,
To lead them all to get eternal life.

I want to do that work, today I heard a call,
To raise those who fall, let them be brought to Jesus the way.

title: Yesu Akwita
swahili_lyrics:
Yesu akwita akwita wewe, uje leo, uje leo,
Kwani kusita akwita wewe, unatanga upeo,

Msikie, msikie, Yesu akwita, ujitoe moyo sasa.

Waliochoka na wapumzike, uje leo, uje leo,
Wenye mizigo wenye huzuni, wapate mapumziko.

Anakungoja uliye yote, uje leo, uje leo,
Uliyekosa usijifiche, woshwe uvikwe nguo.

Yesu asihi wakawiao, waje leo, waje leo,
Watafurahi waaminio, amka upesi njoo.
english_lyrics:
When Jesus calls, he calls you, come today, come today,
Why hesitate when he calls you, you wander the horizon,

Hear, hear, Jesus calling, take heart now.

Let the tired rest, come today, come today,
Sorrowful burdens, rest.

He is waiting for you everywhere, come today, come today,
If you missed it, don't hide yourself, wash yourself and put on clothes.

Jesus begs those who delay, come today, come today,
Believers will be happy, wake up quickly and come.

title: Mlangoni Pa Moyo
swahili_lyrics:
Mlangoni pa moyo, mgeni! (amesimama)
Amesimama pale, mgeni! (amesimama)
Umkaribishe sasa, umkaribishe mwana,
Wa Baba wa upendo, mgeni!(umkaribishe)

Moyo wako kwa Bwana, fungua. (fungulieni)
Asikuache mbali, fungua. (fungulieni)
Umkubali Rafiki, roho atafariji,
Naye atakutunza, fungua. (fungulieni)

Usikie sauti, ya Bwana. (uisikie)
Uyachague mambo, ya Bwana. (mambo ya Bwana)
Ufungue mlango, usimwambie bado:
Jina lake tumai, yu Bwana. (jina la Bwana)

Na ufungue moyo, kwa Bwana (fungulieni)
Utapewa msaada, wa Bwana (msaada wetu)
Uzuri utavikwa dhambi ataondoa,
Ukifungua moyo. kwa Bwana (fungulieni)
english_lyrics:
At the door of the heart, stranger! (standing)
He's standing there, a stranger! (standing)
Welcome him now, welcome him son,
Of the Father of love, stranger! (welcome him)

Open your heart to the Lord. (open)
Let him not leave you far, open. (open)
Accept a friend, the soul will be comforted,
And he will take care of you, open up. (open)

Hear the voice of the Lord. (hear it)
Choose the things of the Lord. (things of the Lord)
Open the door, don't tell him yet:
His name is hope, he is the Lord. (Lord's name)

And open your heart, to the Lord (open)
You will be given help, of the Lord (our help)
Beauty will be clothed with sin he will remove,
If you open your heart. to the Lord (open)

title: Yesu Huita kwa Upole
swahili_lyrics:
Yesu huita kwa upole mwingi, atwita wewe nami,
Moyoni mwetu hungoja hukesha, hukungojea wewe

“Njoni, kwangu, mliochoka njoni”
Yesu huita kwa upole mwingi, akwita, “uje kwangu”.

Atuombeapo usikawie, hutuombea sisi,
Usidharau wema na huruma, huruma kwetu sisi.

Siku za maisha hupita hima, hupita kwako kwangu,
Usiku waja kifo kinakuja, huja kwao na kwangu.

Fikiri juu ya upendo wake, upendo kwako kwangu;
Dhambi zetu amekwisha samehe, msamaha ni wetu.
english_lyrics:
Jesus calls very gently, he calls you and me,
In our heart, we wait and watch, we don't wait for you

"Come to me, you who are tired come"
Jesus calls very gently, calling, "come to me".

When he prays for us don't delay, he prays for us,
Don't underestimate goodness and mercy, mercy to us.

The days of life pass away, they pass to you and to me,
At night death comes, it comes to them and to me.

Think of his love, your love for me;
He has already forgiven our sins, forgiveness is ours.

title: Yesu Aliniita, “Njoo”
swahili_lyrics:
Yesu aliniita “Njoo, Raha iko kwangu,
Kichwa chako ukilaze, kifuani mwangu,”
Nilikwenda kwake mara, sana nilichoka,
Nikapata kwake raha, na furaha tena.

Yesu aliniita “Njoo, kwangu kuna maji,
Maji ya Uzima bure, unywe uwe hai.”
Nilikwenda kwake mara, na maji nikanywa,
Naishi kwake na kiu, kamwe sina tena.

Yesu aliniita “Njoo, dunia i giza,
Ukiitazama nuru, ‘takung’arizia.
Nilikwenda kwake mara, yeye jua langu,
Ni kila wakati mwanga, safarini mwangu.
english_lyrics:
Jesus called me "Come, the pleasure is with me,
Lay your head on my chest,"
I went to him once, I was very tired,
I got pleasure from him, and happiness again.

Jesus called me "Come, I have water,
The Water of Life is free, drink it and live."
I went to him immediately, and I drank water,
I live for him and thirst, I never have any more.

Jesus called me "Come, the world is dark,
If you look at the light, we will shine on you.
I went to him immediately, he my sun,
It is always a light, on my journey.

title: Mchungaji mpenzi
swahili_lyrics:
Mchungaji mpenzi, hukuita uje,
Katika zizi lake, panapo salama,
Akina wanawake, waume vijana,
Yesu aliye kweli, huwaita kwake.

Huita kwa moyo wa huruma, ‘uliyepotea uje kwangu,’
Hivi kukungoja anadumu, Bwana Yesu mchunga.

Akatoa maisha, kwa ajili yetu,
Ataka wapotevu, waje kwake sasa,
Tusijihatarishe, kwake tu salama,
Sikia wito wake, mchungaji wetu.

Tusikawie tena, adui shetani,
Kama mbwa wa mwitu, atatuharibu,
Tunaitwa na Yesu, mkombozi wetu,
Tuingie zizini, panapo nafasi.
english_lyrics:
Dear pastor, I called you to come,
In his stable, where there is safety,
Women, young men,
Jesus who is true, calls them to him.

He calls with a heart of compassion, 'Come to me, you who are lost,'
This is how he waits for you, Lord Jesus the Shepherd.

He gave his life, for us,
He wants the lost to come to him now,
Let's not risk ourselves, just safe for him,
Hear his call, our shepherd.

Let us delay no longer, enemy the devil,
Like a wolf, he will destroy us,
We are called by Jesus, our redeemer,
Let's enter the stable, if there is room.

title: Ukitafuta Mali
swahili_lyrics:
Ukitafuta mali, huna wasaa kwa Yesu?
Kwa matendo ya haki, huna wasaa kwa Yesu?
Anasa za dunia, mambo yako ya raha,
Haya unatafuta, huna wasaa kwa Yesu?

Mambo yanakusonga, kwake huna nafasi?
Watekwa na dunia, kwake huna nafasi?
Humwoni m-langoni, anapopiga hodi?
Daima hukusihi, kwake huna nafasi?

Saa ni za thamani, kwake hamnayo kazi,
Wala hamfanyi bidii, kwake hamnayo kazi?
Hamkufikia kwao, waliomo shimoni,
Na waliopotea, kwake hamnayo kazi?

Na wazaa majani tu? Huna tunda kwa Yesu?
Mikono i mitupu, huna tunda kwa Yesu?
Huna chembe kwa ghala, kazi yako kulipa,
Wala huna furaha unapomwona Yesu.
english_lyrics:
If you seek wealth, do you not have room for Jesus?
For righteous deeds, do you not have room for Jesus?
The pleasures of the world, your pleasures,
What are you looking for, don't you have room for Jesus?

Things are moving you, you don't have time for him?
Captured by the world, you have no chance?
Don't you see him at the gate, when he knocks?
He always begged you, you don't have a chance for him?

Hours are precious, for him you have no work,
And you don't work hard, you have no work for him?
You did not reach them, who are in the pit,
And the lost, you have no work for him?

And they only bear leaves? Don't you have fruit for Jesus?
Hands are empty, do you have no fruit for Jesus?
You don't have a particle to store, your work to pay,
And you are not happy when you see Jesus.

title: Sauti ni yake Bwana
swahili_lyrics:
Sauti ni yake Bwana, “Kwenda nani tayari?
Mavuno yanakawia, nani atayavuna?
Kwa kudumu anaita, zawadi atatoa,
Nani atakayejibu, “Nipo Bwana nitume.”

Kama huwezi safari, hata nchi za mbali,
Pana watu karibuni, wasiomjua Yesu,
Kama huwezi kusema, jinsi ya malaika,
Waweza kuutangaza, upendo wa Mwokozi.

Ingawa huwezi kuwa, mkesha mlangoni,
Ukiwatolea watu, nafasi ya uzima,
Kwa sala na kwa sadaka, watoa msaada,
Kama Haruni mwaminifu, kuinua mikono.

Roho za watu zikifa, Bwana akikuita,
Usiseme kwa uvivu, “Hakuna kazi kwangu.”
Kwa furaha anza kazi, ile aliyokupa,
Ukajibu mara moja, “Nipo Bwana, nitume.”
english_lyrics:
The voice is the Lord's, "Going to whom already?
The harvest is delayed, who will harvest it?
Perpetually he calls, gifts he will give,
Who will answer, "I am here, Lord, send me."

If you can't travel, even to distant countries,
There are people recently, who do not know Jesus,
If you cannot say, how of an angel,
You can proclaim it, the love of the Savior.

Though you cannot be, watch at the door,
If you give people a chance at life,
By prayer and by alms, those who give aid,
Like faithful Aaron, raise your hands.

When people's souls die, the Lord calls you,
Do not lazily say, "There is no work for me."
With joy begin the work, the one he gave you,
You answered immediately, "I am here, Lord, send me."

title: Tumesikia Mbiu
swahili_lyrics:
Tumesikia mbiu, Yesu huokoa;
Utangazeni kote, Yesu huokoa.
Tiini amri hiyo, nchini baharini,
Enezeni mbiu hii, Yesu huokoa.

Imba nawe askari, Yesu huokoa,
Kwa nguvu ya kombozi, Yesu huokoa,
Imbeni wenye shida, unapoumwa moyo,
Mauti imeshindwa, Yesu huokoa.

Mawimbini uenee, Yesu huokoa,
Wenye dhambi jueni, Yesu huokoa,
Visiwa na viimbe, vilindi itikeni,
Na nchi shangilia, Yesu huokoa.

Upepo utangaze, Yesu huokoa,
Mataifa yashangaa, Yesu huokoa,
Milimani, bondeni, sauti isikike,
Ya wimbo wa washindi, Yesu huokoa.
english_lyrics:
We have heard the slogan, Jesus saves;
Spread the word, Jesus saves.
Obey that command, in the land of the sea,
Spread this slogan, Jesus saves.

Sing with you soldiers, Jesus saves,
By the power of redemption, Jesus saves,
Sing the troubled, when your heart aches,
Death is defeated, Jesus saves.

Spread over the waves, Jesus saves,
Sinners know, Jesus saves,
The islands are swollen, the deep is silent,
And the earth rejoices, Jesus saves.

The wind will proclaim, Jesus saves,
The nations are surprised, Jesus saves,
In the mountains, in the valley, let the voice be heard,
Of the song of the victors, Jesus saves.

title: Anisikiaye
swahili_lyrics:
Anisikiaye aliye yote, sana litangaze wajue wote,
Duniani kote neno wapate, atakaye na aje!

Ni “atakaye,” ni “atakaye,”
Pwani hata bara, na litangae,
Ni Baba mpenzi alinganaye, atakaye na aje.

Anijiliaye Yesu asema, asikawe aje hima mapema,
Ndimi njia kweli ndimi uzima, atakaye na aje.

Atakaye aje, ndiyo ahadi, atakaye hiyo haitarudi,
Atakaye lake ni la ahadi, atakaye na aje.
english_lyrics:
He who hears me, who is all, may proclaim it so that all may know,
All over the world, get the word, whoever wants to come!

It is "who will," it is "who will,"
Coast to mainland, let it wander,
He is a loving Father who is consistent, who will and will come.

He who comes to me, Jesus says, should not come early,
I am the way, I am the life, whoever wants to come.

Whoever wants to come, yes the promise, whoever wants that will not return,
Whoever wants it is of the promise, whoever wants it, let him come.

title: Mlango Uko wa Wema
swahili_lyrics:
Mlango uko wa wema, mlango wazi huo,
Yesu ameufungua, na hakuna kufunga.

Mlango wazi ajabu, uliachwa wazi kwangu.
Kwangu, Kwangu? Wazi wazi kwangu.

Mlango hukaa wazi, watu waokolewe.
Maskini na matajiri, wa mataifa yote.

Maadam mlango wazi, rafiki kaza mwendo,
Msalaba ukubali, amana ya upendo.

Msalaba tutabeba, daima na furaha,
‘Pendo wa Yesu hushinda, tunainama kwake.
english_lyrics:
The door is of goodness, that open door,
Jesus has opened it, and there is no closing.

A wonderfully open door, was left open for me.
To me, to me? Obviously clear to me.

The door stays open, people are saved.
The poor and the rich, of all nations.

As long as the door is open, my friend, slow down,
Accept the cross, deposit of love.

The cross we will carry, always with joy,
'The love of Jesus wins, we bow to him.

title: Tabibu Mkuu
swahili_lyrics:
Tabibu mkuu huyu, Yesu mwenye huruma,
Atuletaye faraja, Yesu Mwokozi wetu.

Imbeni malaika, sifa za Bwana wetu,
Jina la pekee kwetu, ni la Yesu Bwana.

Mwana Kondoo msifuni, msifuni Mwokozi;
Hatia zote na dhambi, huziondoa Yesu.

Hakuna jina jingine, linalofaa sifa,
Au kutufurahisha, isipokuwa lake.

Naye atakapokuja, na utukufu wake,
Tutafurahi milele, kukaa kwake Bwana.
english_lyrics:
This great physician, merciful Jesus,
Who brings us comfort, Jesus our Savior.

Sing angels, the praises of our Lord,
The only name for us is that of Jesus the Lord.

Praise the Lamb, praise the Savior;
All guilt and sin, Jesus takes them away.

There is no other name, worthy of praise,
Or make us happy, except for him.

And when he comes, with his glory,
We will rejoice forever, the Lord's dwelling.

title: Wewe umechoka sana?
swahili_lyrics:
Wewe umechoka sana? Wataka raha?
Kwake Yesu utapata msaada.

Alama anazo yeye? Sana makovu,
Ya mikono na miguu na mbavu.

Naye amevikwa taji, kichwani mwake?
Taji kweli alivikwa miiba.

Huku nikimfuata, nipate nini?
Maonjo nje na ndani - amani.

Kwamba namwandama yeye, mwisho ni nini?
Kurithi furaha naye - milele.
english_lyrics:
Are you very tired? Want fun?
In Jesus you will find help.

What marks does he have? So many scars,
Of hands and feet and ribs.

And he is crowned, on his head?
The crown was actually covered with thorns.

While I follow him, what can I get?
Tastes outside and inside - peace.

That I am with him, what is the end?
Inherit happiness with him - forever.

title: Damu Imebubujika
swahili_lyrics:
Damu imebubujika, ni ya Imanweli,
Wakioga wenye taka, husafiwa kweli.

Ilimpa kushukuru, mwivi mautini,
Nami nisiye udhuru, yanisafi ndani.

Kondoo wa kuuawa, damu ina nguvu,
Wako wote kuokoa, kwa utimilivu.

Bwana tangu damu yako, kunisafi kale,
Nimeimba sifa zako, ‘taimba milele.

Bwana, umenikirimu, nisiyestahili
Kwa damu yako sehemu, ya mali ya kweli.

Nikubali kukwimbia, mbinguni milele.
Mungu nitamsifia, jina lako pekee.
english_lyrics:
The blood has flowed, it is Immanuel's,
Those who bathe with waste, are truly cleansed.

It gave him thanks, the thief of death,
And I have no excuses, I am clean inside.

A sheep to be slain, blood is strong,
All are yours to save, to the full.

Lord, since your blood, cleansed me long ago,
I have sung your praises, I will sing forever.

Lord, you have been kind to me, undeserving
For your blood part, of true wealth.

Let me run away, forever in heaven.
God I will praise, only your name.

title: Yesu Mwokozi
swahili_lyrics:
Yesu Mwokozi ili nitakaswe, nataka moyo uwe enzi yako,
Ukiangushe kilichoinuka, unioshe sasa niwe mweupe.

Mweupe tu, ndiyo mweupe,
Ukiniosha nitakuwa safi.

Bwana Yesu sasa unitazame, unifanye niwe dhabihu hai,
Najitoa kwako na moyo vyote, unioshe sana niwe mweupe.

Bwana kwa hiyo nakuomba sana, nakungojea miguuni pako,
Wanaokuja hutupi kamwe, unioshe sasa niwe mweupe.
english_lyrics:
Jesus Savior so that I may be purified, I want my heart to be your kingdom,
If you knock down what has risen, wash me now and be white.

Only white, yes white,
If you wash me, I will be clean.

Lord Jesus, look at me now, make me a living sacrifice,
I give myself to you with all my heart, wash me so that I may be white.

Lord, therefore I pray to you, I wait at your feet,
Those who come never throw me away, wash me now and be white.

title: Naendea Msalaba
swahili_lyrics:
Naendea msalaba, ni mnyonge mpofu,
Yapitayo naacha, nipe msalaba tu.

Nakutumaini tu, ewe Mwana wa Mungu;
Nainamia kwako, niponye sasa Bwana.

Nakulilia sana, nalemewa na dhambi,
Pole Yesu asema, “Nitazifuta zote.”

Natoa vyote kwako, nafasi nazo nguvu,
Roho yangu na mwili, viwe vyako milele.

Kwa damu yake sasa, amenivuta sana,
Upendo hubidisha, nimtafute Mwokozi.
english_lyrics:
I'm going to the cross, I'm poor and blind,
The last one I stop, just give me a cross.

I only trust you, O Son of God;
I bow to you, heal me now Lord.

I cry for you, I am burdened by sin,
Jesus says, "I will wipe them all out."

I give all to you, space and strength,
My soul and body, may they be yours forever.

With his blood now, he has pulled me hard,
Love compels me to seek the Savior.

title: Bwana Ninataka Hili
swahili_lyrics:
Bwana ninataka hili, kwa kuwa nimechafuka,
Kwa moto au kwa maji, unisafishe kabisa.

Unisafishe Mwokozi, ndani na nje kwa moto,
Utakavyo ili dhambi, ife kwangu ife kwangu.

Kupewa hekima yote, itakuwa tunu kubwa,
Lakini moyo safi ni, bora kwangu bora kwangu.

Mpaka moyo ni safi, siwezi kuyafahamu,
Mambo mazuri ya mbingu, mambo mazuri ya mbingu.
english_lyrics:
Lord I want this, for I am angry,
By fire or by water, cleanse me thoroughly.

Cleanse me Saviour, inside and out with fire,
Let sin die to me, let it die to me.

To be given all wisdom, it will be a great value,
But a pure heart is, the best for me the best for me.

Until the heart is pure, I cannot understand them,
The good things of heaven, the good things of heaven.

title: Wamwendea Yesu?
swahili_lyrics:
Wamwendea Yesu kwa kusafiwa? kuoshwa kwa damu ya Kondoo?
Je, neema yake umemwagiwa? Waoshwa kwa damu ya Kondoo?

Kuoshwa, kwa damu itutakasayo ya Kondoo,
Ziwe safi nguo nyeupe sana, waoshwa kwa damu ya Kondoo?

WamwandamadaimaMkombozi? waoshwakwadamuyaKondoo?
Yako kwa Msulubiwa mavazi? waoshwa kwa damu ya Kondoo?

Atakapokuja Bwana-arusi, uwe safi katika damu!
Yafae kwenda mbinguni mavazi, waoshwa kwa damu ya Kondoo?

Yatupwe yalipo na takataka, uoshwe kwa damu ya Kondoo, Huoni
kijito chatiririka, uoshwe kwa damu ya Kondoo
english_lyrics:
Did they go to Jesus for purification? washed in the blood of the Lamb?
Has his grace been poured out on you? Washed in the blood of the Lamb?

Washed, by the cleansing blood of the Lamb,
May the white clothes be clean, washed in the blood of the Lamb?

WamwandamadamaiMkombozi? are they washed by sheep?
Yours for the Crucifixion dress? washed in the blood of the Lamb?

When the Bridegroom comes, be pure in blood!
Should clothing go to heaven, washed in the blood of the Lamb?

Throw them away where there is garbage, wash them with the blood of the Lamb, you see
flowing stream, be washed in the blood of the Lamb

title: Nilipotoka Kabisa
swahili_lyrics:
Nilipotoka kabisa, sasa narudi,
Nikakawia dhambini, Bwana narudi.

Narudi nyumbani, daima kwako,
Kwa upendo nipokee, naja nyumbani.

Nikasusurika sana, sasa narudi,
Mwenye uchungu natubu, Bwana narudi.

Nimechoka maovuni, sasa narudi,
Pendo lako lanivuta, Bwana narudi.

Ndilo tumaini langu, sasa narudi,
Yesu alinifilia, Bwana narudi.

Damu yake yanitosha, sasa narudi,
Unioshe kenyekenye, Bwana narudi.
english_lyrics:
When I was completely gone, now I'm coming back,
I lingered in sin, Lord I return.

I come home, always to you,
Receive me with love, I am coming home.

I survived a lot, now I'm coming back,
Painful one, I repent, Lord, I return.

I am tired of evil, now I return,
Your love draws me, Lord I return.

That is my hope, now I return,
Jesus healed me, Lord I am coming back.

His blood is enough for me, now I return,
Wash me gently, Lord, I will return.

title: Yesu Anasema
swahili_lyrics:
Yesu anasema, “Wewe huna nguvu,
Kesha ukaombe, na uje mwanangu.”

Alilipa bei, nawiwa naye,
Dhambi ilitia waa, aliiondoa.

Bwana nimeona, uwezo wako tu,
Waweza takasa, mioyo michafu.

Sina kitu chema, kudai neema,
Hivi nitafua, mavazi kwa damu.

Ninaposimama, juu ya mawingu,
Taji nitaweka, miguuni pa Yesu.
english_lyrics:
Jesus says, "You have no power,
Pray tomorrow, and come my son."

He paid the price, I owe him,
Sin caused it, he removed it.

Lord I have seen, only your power,
You can purify, impure hearts.

I have nothing good, to claim grace,
So I will wash, clothes with blood.

When I stand, above the clouds,
I will place the crown at the feet of Jesus.

title: Msalaba wa Yesu
swahili_lyrics:
Msalaba wa Yesu, nikae karibu,
Pale pana chemchemi, ya kuponya dhambi.

Pale msalaba, msalaba wake,
Huo ni sifa yangu, kwa maisha yote.

Karibu msalaba, nalitetemeka,
Pendo likaniona, likanirehemu.

Unikumbushe Yesu, nikuone pale,
Niupate upendo, na kuvutwa nao.

Karibu msalaba, kwa kutegemea,
Kukesha na kungoja, nitakaa pale.
english_lyrics:
Cross of Jesus, stay close,
There is a spring, to heal sins.

There the cross, his cross,
That is my reputation, for life.

Near the cross, I trembled,
Love saw me, had mercy on me.

Remind me of Jesus, let me see you there,
May I find love, and be drawn to them.

Around the cross, depending on,
Staying awake and waiting, I will stay there.

title: Katika Wenye dhambi
swahili_lyrics:
Katika wenye dhambi, ndimi mkuu wao,
Ila Yesu akaja, kwa dhambi alikufa,
Akamimina damu, niupate uzima.

Ajabu! Pendo lake, pendo lililo kuu,
Pendo lisilo mwisho, lidumulo milele,
Lililonitafuta, ingawa sikumpenda.

Ingawa ni mbaya, Kristo ni vyote kwangu,
Ajua haja zangu, huzuni zangu zake,
Hata katika vita, akiwapo salama.
english_lyrics:
Among sinners, I am their chief,
But Jesus came, for sin he died,
He shed his blood, that I may live.

Amazing! His love, great love,
Love that never ends, lasts forever,
It looked for me, even though I didn't like it.

Even though it's bad, Christ is everything to me,
He knows my needs, my sorrows,
Even in war, he is safe.

title: Yote Namtolea Yesu
swahili_lyrics:
Yote namtolea Yesu, moyo wangu ni wake,
Ninavutwa na upendo, kwa hivyo najitoa.

Yote kwa Yesu, yote kwa Yesu,
Upendo wako hushinda, Yesu natoa.

Yote namtolea Yesu, nainamia pake,
Nimeacha na anasa, kwako Yesu nipokee.

Yote namtolea Yesu, nifanye niwe wako,
Nipe Roho yako, Bwana, anilinde daima.

Yote namtolea Yesu, nami naona sasa,
Furaha ya ukombozi, nasifu jina lake.
english_lyrics:
I give all to Jesus, my heart is his,
I am drawn by love, so I give myself away.

All for Jesus, all for Jesus,
Your love wins, Jesus I give.

I give it all to Jesus, I bow to him,
I have given up luxury, Jesus receive me.

I give it all to Jesus, make me yours,
Give me your Spirit, Lord, protect me always.

I give it all to Jesus, and I see now,
Joy of redemption, I praise his name.

title: Yesu kwa Imani
swahili_lyrics:
Yesu kwa imani, nakutumaini, peke yako,
Nisikie sasa, na kunitakasa, ni wako kabisa
Tangu leo.

Nipe nguvu pia, za kusaidia, moyo wangu,
Ulikufa wewe, wokovu nipewe, nakupenda wewe,
Bwana wangu.

Hapa nazunguka, katika mashaka, na matata,
Palipo na giza, utaniongoza, hivi nitaweza kufuata.
english_lyrics:
Jesus by faith, I trust you, alone,
Hear me now, and cleanse me, it is entirely yours
From today.

Give me strength too, to help, my heart,
You died, give me salvation, I love you,
my lord

Here I wander, in doubt, and trouble,
Where there is darkness, you will lead me, so I can follow.

title: Umechoka? Je, Umesumbuka?
swahili_lyrics:
Umechoka je umesumbuka? mwambie Yesu sumbuko
lako, Unayalilia yapitayo? mwambie Yesu pekee.

Mwambie Yesu sumbuko lako, yu rafiki amini,
Hakuna rafiki kama yeye, mwambie Yesu pekee.

Je, machozi yakulengalenga? mwambie Yesu sumbuko
lako, Walemewa na dhambi rohoni? mwambie Yesu pekee.

Waogopa shida na majonzi? mwambie Yesu sumbuko lako,
Wasumbukia mambo yajayo? mwambie Yesu pekee.

Kuwazia kifo kukutisha? mwambie Yesu sumbuko
lako, Watamania ufalme wake? mwambie Yesu pekee.
english_lyrics:
Are you tired or troubled? tell Jesus the trouble
yours, do you mourn the past? tell Jesus only.

Tell Jesus your trouble, he is a faithful friend,
There is no friend like him, tell only Jesus.

Did the tears come to your eyes? tell Jesus the trouble
Are you burdened with sin in the soul? tell Jesus only.

Are you afraid of problems and sorrows? tell Jesus your trouble,
Do they disturb the future? tell Jesus only.

Imagining death scares you? tell Jesus the trouble
yours, will they covet his kingdom? tell Jesus only.

title: Uniangalie
swahili_lyrics:
‘Uniangalie’ atwambia, Yesu aliyetufia,
Msalabani ni uzima, hapa utaipata hazina.

Kutazama Kalwari, kutazama Kalwari,
Ni kupewa kuishi, kuutazama mti.

Ninapojaribiwa ghafula, Shetani hatanitega,
Nikitazama msalaba, nguvu nitaipata kwa Bwana.

Msalaba nitautazama, kila wakati daima.
Ahadi nitategemea, hivi kabisa sitaanguka.
english_lyrics:
'Look at me' he says, Jesus who died for us,
The cross is life, here you will find the treasure.

Looking at Calvary, looking at Calvary,
It is given to live, to look at the tree.

When I am suddenly tempted, Satan will not tempt me,
If I look at the cross, I will find strength in the Lord.

I will look at the cross, always always.
Promise I will rely on, this way I will not fall.

title: Nina Haja Nawe
swahili_lyrics:
Nina haja nawe, kila saa,
Hawezi mwingine, kunifaa.

Yesu nakuhitaji, vivyo kila saa,
Niwezeshe Mwokozi, nakujia.

Nina haja nawe, kaa nami,
Na maonjo haya, hayaumi.

Nina haja nawe, kila hali,
Maisha ni bure, uli mbali.

Nina haja nawe, nifundishe,
Na ahadi zako, zifikishe.

Nina haja nawe, mweza yote,
Ni wako kabisa, siku zote.
english_lyrics:
I need you, every hour,
No one else can, suit me.

Jesus I need you, the same every hour,
Empower me Savior, I come to you.

I need you, stay with me,
And these flavors don't hurt.

I need you, every situation,
Life is free, you are far away.

I need you, teach me,
And your promises, deliver them.

I need you, almighty,
They are yours completely, always.

title: Nionapo Amani Kama Shwari
swahili_lyrics:
Nionapo amani kama shwari, au nionapo shida,
Kwa hali zote umenijulisha, ni salama rohoni mwangu.

Salama rohoni, ni salama rohoni mwangu.

Ingawa Shetani atanitesa, nitajipa moyo kwani,
Kristo ameona unyonge wangu, amekufa kwa roho yangu.

Dhambi zangu zote wala si nusu, huwekwa msalabani,
Wala sichukui laana yake, ni salama rohoni mwangu.

Ee Bwana himiza siku ya kuja, panda itakapolia,
Utakaposhuka sitaogopa, ni salama rohoni mwangu.
english_lyrics:
When I see peace as calm, or when I see trouble,
In all cases you have informed me, it is safe in my soul.

Safe in spirit, safe in my soul.

Although Satan will torment me, I will encourage myself because,
Christ has seen my weakness, he has died for my soul.

All my sins, not half, are laid on the cross,
And I do not take his curse, it is safe in my soul.

O Lord, encourage the day to come, when it cries,
When you come down I will not be afraid, it is safe in my soul.

title: Namwandama Bwana
swahili_lyrics:
Namwandama Bwana, kwa alilonena, njia zangu huning’azia
Na nikimridhisha, atanidumisha, taamini nitii pia.

Kuamini, njia pekee ni hii,
Ya furaha kwa Yesu, amini ukatii.

Giza sina kwangu, wala hata wingu, yeye mara huviondoa,
Woga wasiwasi, sononeko basi, huamini nitii pia.

Masumbuko yote, sikitiko lote, kwa mapenzi hunilipia,
Baa dhara dhiki, vivyo hubariki, taamini nitii pia.

Mimi sitajua, raha sawasawa, ila yote Yesu kumtoa,
Napata fadhili, na radhi kamili, taamini nitii pia.

Nitamfurahia, na kumtumaini, majumbani na njia-njia;
Agizo natenda; nikitumwa huenda, huamini, nitii pia.
english_lyrics:
I pray to the Lord, because of what he said, my ways shine
And if I satisfy him, he will maintain me, trust me to obey too.

Believing, the only way is this,
Of joy in Jesus, believe and obey.

I have no darkness, not even a cloud, he immediately removes it,
Don't be afraid, don't worry, don't believe I will obey too.

All the troubles, all the sorrows, with love they pay for me,
I suffer hardship, so I bless, trust me to obey too.

I will not know, the same pleasure, but all that Jesus gave,
I find kindness, and full satisfaction, trust me to obey too.

I will rejoice in him, and trust in him, in the houses and in the streets;
Order I do; If I am sent, I will go, you do not believe, I will also obey.

title: Kumtegemea Mwokozi
swahili_lyrics:
Kumtegemea Mwokozi, kwangu tamu kabisa,
Kukubali neno lake, nina raha moyoni.

Yesu Yesu namwamini, nimemwona thabiti,
Yesu Yesu yu thamani, ahadi zake kweli.

Kumtegemea Mwokozi, kwangu tamu kabisa,
Kuamini damu yake, nimeoshwa kamili.
3. Kumtegemea Mwokozi, kwangu tamu kabisa,
Kwake daima napata, uzima na amani.
4. Nafurahi kwa sababu, nimekutegemea,
Yesu mpendwa rafiki, uwe nami dawamu.
english_lyrics:
Trusting in the Saviour, sweetest to me,
Accepting his word, I have peace in my heart.

Jesus Jesus I believe, I have seen him firm,
Jesus Jesus is precious, his promises are true.

Trusting in the Saviour, sweetest to me,
Believing in his blood, I am completely washed.
3. Trusting in the Savior, sweet to me,
From him I always find, life and peace.
4. I rejoice because I have trusted in you,
Jesus dear friend, be with me always.

title: Yesu Kwetu ni Rafiki
swahili_lyrics:
Yesu kwetu ni rafiki, wambiwa haja pia,
Tukiomba kwa Babaye, maombi asikia,
Lakini twajikosesha, twajitweka vibaya,
Kama tulimwomba Mungu, dua alisikia.

Una dhiki na maonjo? unamashaka pia?
Haifai kufa moyo, dua atasikia,
Hakuna mwingine mwema, wa kutuhurumia,
Atujua tu dhaifu, maombi asikia.

Je hunayo hata nguvu, huwezi kwendelea,
Ujapodharauliwa, njaporushwa pia,
Watu wakikudharau, wapendao dunia,
Hukwambata mikononi, dua atasikia.
english_lyrics:
Jesus is a friend to us, a close friend too,
If we pray to the Father, he hears the prayer,
But we make mistakes, we misplace ourselves,
If we prayed to God, he heard the prayer.

Do you have stress and anxiety? Do you have doubts too?
It is not worth dying, the prayer will be heard,
There is no other good, to pity us,
He knows only the weak, he hears prayers.

Don't you even have the strength, you can't go on,
When you are despised, when I am thrown too,
If men despise you, lovers of the world,
You don't hold hands, he will hear your prayers.

Namtegemea Mungu niwapo, humo barani na baharini,
Yeye wa mbinguni anilinda, Baba wa mbinguni anilinda.

Namwamini, Mungu anitunza (anitunza)
Milimani (milimani) au baharini (baharini), baharini
Moyo wangu (moyo wangu) aulinda (aulinda),
Baba wa mbinguni anilinda.

La waridi alinawirisha, na huyo tai juu angani,
Nami kweli ananilinda, Baba wa mbinguni anilinda.

Tunduni mwa simba namwamini, kwenye vita ama gerezani,
Motoni na furikoni, Baba wa mbinguni anilinda.

Bondeni mwa giza na upweke, mchunga wangu yu anilinda,
Kwa upole aniongoza, Baba wa mbinguni anilinda.
english_lyrics:
I trust God to be there, on the land and in the sea,
He of heaven protects me, Father of heaven protects me.

I believe, God takes care of me (takes care of me)
In the mountains (in the mountains) or in the sea (in the sea), in the sea
My heart (my heart) protects (protects),
Heavenly Father protect me.

The rose bloomed, and the eagle high in the sky,
And he really protects me, the heavenly Father protects me.

In the lion's den I trust him, in battle or in prison,
In the fire and the storm, the heavenly Father protects me.

In the valley of darkness and loneliness, my shepherd is protecting me,
He gently guides me, the heavenly Father protects me.

title: Bwana ni Mchunga
swahili_lyrics:
Bwana ni mchunga sitahitaji,
Majani mabichi malisho yangu.
Ananinywesha maji matulivu,
Atanirudisha nikipotea.

Nipitapo bondeni mwa mauti,
U mlinzi wangu sitaogopa,
Fimbo yako yatosha kunilinda,
Ukinifariji sina hasara.

Kati ya mateso meza waandaa,
Na kikombe changu kinafurika,
Umenipaka kichwani mafuta,
Nitaulizaje zaidi kwako?

Wema na fadhili zinifuate,
Siku zangu zote hata milele,
Nami nitakaa nyumbani mwa Bwana,
Katika ufalme wa pendo lake.
english_lyrics:
The Lord is a shepherd I will not need,
Green leaves are my feed.
He gives me still water to drink,
He will bring me back when I am lost.

When I pass through the valley of death,
You are my protector, I will not be afraid,
Your staff is enough to protect me,
If you comfort me, I have no loss.

Among the sufferings they prepare the table,
And my cup overflows,
You have oiled my head,
How can I ask you more?

Goodness and kindness follow me,
all my days forever,
And I will dwell in the house of the Lord,
In the kingdom of his love.

title: Po pote na Yesu
swahili_lyrics:
Po pote na Yesu nina furaha, anitumako Yesu ndiyo raha,
Asipokuwako hapanifai, akiwapo Yesu mimi sitishwi.

Po pote, po pote, sina mashaka,
Po pote na Yesu, naweza kwenda.

Akiwapo Yesu si peke yangu, na nijapotupwa akali wangu
Ajaponiongoza njia mbaya, niwapo na Yesu ninashukuru,

Akiwapo Yesu naweza lala, naweza pumzika hata kiyama,
Kisha nitakwenda kwake milele, akiwapo Yesu furaha tele.
english_lyrics:
Wherever I am with Jesus I am happy, wherever Jesus sends me is the joy,
When he is not there it does not suit me, when Jesus is there I am not threatened.

Everywhere, everywhere, I have no doubt,
Anywhere with Jesus, I can go.

When Jesus is there I am not alone, and when I am thrown my mind
When he leads me down the wrong path, I am with Jesus and I am grateful,

If Jesus is there, I can sleep, I can rest until eternity,
Then I will go to him forever, in the presence of Jesus full of joy.

Tafuta daima utakatifu, fanya urafiki na watu wote,
Nena siku zote na Bwana wako, baraka uombe kwa kila jambo.

Tafuta daima utakatifu, uwe peke yako ukimwabudu,
Ukimwangalia Mwokozi wako, utabadilishwa kama alivyo.

Tafuta daima utakatifu, kiongozi wako awe Yesu tu,
Katika furaha au huzuni, dumu kumfuata Yesu Mwokozi.

Tafuta daima utakatifu, umtawaze roho moyoni mwako,

Always seek holiness, make friends with all people,
Always talk to your Lord, pray for blessings for everything.

Always seek holiness, be alone in worshiping Him,
If you look to your Savior, you will be changed as he is.

Always seek holiness, let Jesus be your leader,
In happiness or sadness, always follow Jesus the Savior.

Always seek holiness, anoint the spirit in your heart,
If he guides you in righteousness, he is made ready for his work.

title: Saa Heri ya Maombi
swahili_lyrics:
Saa heri ya maombi, sasa kwako tunarudi,
Sumbuku ya kuondoa, shida zetu na pungufu,
Taabuni mara nyingi, roho zetu zimepona,
Mashakani tumeshinda, wakati wa saa tamu.

Saa heri ya maombi, twapeleka dhiki zetu,
Kwake aliyeahidi, kubariki wenye haja,
Huagiza tumwendee, tutegemee neno lake,
Hivyo tumwekee yote, wakati wa saa tamu.

Saa heri ya maombi, tutazidi kuingia,
Bomani mwetu na ngome, hata tuishapo mwendo,
Yesu atatusikia, tutamtafuta daima,
Na tutakapokutana, tutamwona-saa tamu.
english_lyrics:
Happy hour of prayer, now to you we return,
Trouble to remove, our problems and shortcomings,
Tried often, our souls are healed,
Doubts we have overcome, during the sweet hour.

Happy hour of prayer, we send our troubles,
To him who promised, to bless the needy,
He instructs us to go to him, to rely on his word,
So let's put it all to him, during the sweet hour.

Good hour of prayer, we will continue to enter,
Our fortress and fortress, until we run out,
Jesus will hear us, we will always seek him,
And when we meet, we will see him-a sweet hour.

Be like Jesus, be like Jesus,
Guide me father, let me be like Jesus.

Give me love father, save people,
At home and in the city, be like Jesus.

And let me know, time is short,

Nitakuandama kote, nitakapoangizwa.

Nitakuandama kote, naam ulinifia,

Njia ijapoparuza, kwa miiba na fujo,
Ulitangulia mbele, nami nitaandama.

Nijapokuta taabu, na majaribu kote,
Nakumbuka shida yako, nami nitaandama.

Nijapoona ukiwa, na mateso makali,

Ijapo wanipeleka, vilindini mwa giza,

english_lyrics:
I will follow you around, when I am included.
If you lead me, I will follow.

I will accompany you everywhere, yes you died for me,
By your grace Lord, I want to march.

When the path is torn, with thorns and chaos,
You went ahead, and I will follow.

When I find trouble, and trials everywhere,
I remember your problem, and I will follow.

When I saw desolation, and severe suffering,
You obeyed, and I will obey.

Even if they take me, deep into the darkness,
You obeyed, and I will obey.

Nitwae hivi nilivyo, umemwaga damu yako,

Hivi nilivyo sioni, kamwe furaha moyoni,
Daima ni mashakani, Bwana Yesu sasa, naja.

Hivi nilivyo mimi tu, siwezi kujiokoa,

What I am is not mine, wash my soul,
Forgive me my sins, Lord Jesus now, I am coming.

It is always doubtful, Lord Jesus now, I am coming.

As I am blind, poor and weak,
You are the rich, Lord Jesus now, I am coming.

This is just me, I can't save myself,
And you will not reject me, Lord Jesus now, I am coming.

As I am, love has given me a clear path,
I don't care about the situation and wealth, Lord Jesus now, I'm coming.

title: Chini ya Msalaba
swahili_lyrics:
Chini ya msalaba, nataka simama,
Ndio mwamba safarini, wa kivuli chema,
Ni kweli kwa roho yangu, ni tuo kamili,
Tatua mzigo wangu, wakati wa hari.

Hapa ni pema sana, ni ngome kamili,
Hapa yameonekana, mapenzi ya kweli,
Kama alivyoonyeshwa, Yakobo zamani,
Msalaba umekuwa, ngazi ya mbinguni.

Na Yesu Msalabani, walimkemea,
Alikufa niokoke, niliyepotea,
Naona ajabu sana, ya mambo mawili,
Jinsi alivyonipenda, nisiyestahili.

Atakayeonana na, Yesu mbinguni,
Njia yake aanzapo, ni Msalabani;
Wokovu upo hapa tu, mwingine hapana,
Kisha kuna furaha kuu, pamoja na Bwana.
english_lyrics:
Under the cross, I want to stand,
Yes, the rock on the journey, of good shade,
It is true to my soul, it is perfect,
Resolve my burden, in the heat of the day.

Here it is very good, it is a complete fortress,
Here is seen, true love,
As he was shown, Jacob of old,
The cross has become, the ladder of heaven.

And Jesus on the Cross, they rebuked him,
He died to save me, I was lost,
I find it very strange, of two things,
How he loved me, undeserving.

Who will meet, Jesus in heaven,
His way when he begins, is the Cross;
Salvation is only here, there is no other,
Then there is great joy, with the Lord.

He shed his blood, to free me from sin.

I believe in your son, give me your strength,

title: Twae Wangu Uzima
swahili_lyrics:
Twae wangu uzima, sadaka ya daima,

Twae mikono nayo, ifanye upendayo,
Twae yangu miguu, kwa uongozi wako tu.

Twae sauti yangu, niimbe kwa Mungu tu,
Itwae na midomo, ijae neno lako.

Twae dhahabu pia, na yote ya dunia,
Twae yangu hekima, upendavyo tumia.

Nia itwae Mungu, haitakuwa yangu,

Twae mapenzi yangu, sifa za moyo wangu,
Twae kabisa nafsi, niwe wako halisi
english_lyrics:
Take my life, a perpetual sacrifice,
Let us glorify you here at night and day.

Take hands with it, do what you like,
Take my feet, just for your guidance.

Take my voice, let me sing only to God,
Take it with your lips, fill it with your word.

Take the gold too, and all the earth,
Take my wisdom, use it as you wish.

Let the intention be God's, it will not be mine,
Our heart is yours, be your home.

Take my love, the qualities of my heart,
Take your soul completely, be yours truly

title: Tawala Ndani Yangu
swahili_lyrics:
Tawala ndani yangu, ee Yesu mfalme,
Uwe kwangu majibu, kwa maswali yangu,
Uishi ndani yangu, wewe mwongozi,
Utumishi ni wangu, wako utukufu.

Hekalu nimetoa, umelisafisha,
Sasa fahari yako, imulike ndani,
Dunia iwe kimya, mwili sasa uwe,
Mtumwa mtulivu, wa kukutii tu.

Viungo vyake mwili, vyote vyakungoja,
Tayari vikiitwa, kwenda kusimama,
Bila manung’uniko, au malaumu,
Au kusumbuliwa, pasipo majuto.

Niwe na utulivu, pasipo haraka,
Tayari kungojea, maagizo yako,
Tawala ndani yangu, ee Yesu mfalme,
Uwe kwangu majibu, kwa maswali yote.
english_lyrics:
Reign in me, O King Jesus,
Be my answers, to my questions,
Live in me, you guide,
The service is mine, the glory is yours.

I gave the temple, you cleaned it,
Now your pride, shine within,
The world be silent, the body now be,
A quiet, obedient slave.

His limbs, all waiting for you,
Already being called, to stand up,
Without murmuring, or reproach,
Or disturbed, without regret.

Be calm, not in a hurry,
Ready to wait, your orders,
Reign in me, O King Jesus,
Be my answer, to all questions.

title: Univute Karibu
swahili_lyrics:
Univute karibu Baba, unikumbatie,
Unisogeze kifuani, nataka pumziko.

Univute karibu, (Vuta univute karibu)
Kwa kamba za upendo, (Kwa kamba, kamba za upendo)
Univute (Kwa kamba za upendo, univute karibu)
Karibu nawe. (Univute karibu)

Univute Mwokozi wangu, na tusiachane,
Mikono yako juu, yangu leo niione.

Univute kwa roho yako, nifanane nawe,
Unioshe unihuishe, niwe safi huru.
english_lyrics:
Pull me close Father, hug me,
Move me to your chest, I want rest.

Pull me closer, (Pull me closer)
With strings of love, (With strings, strings of love)
Pull me (With strings of love, pull me close)
Welcome to you. (pull me close)

Draw me my Saviour, and let us not part,
Your hands up, let me see it today.

Draw me with your spirit, let me be like you,
Wash me and revive me, let me be clean and free.

title: Kuwa Wake Yesu
swahili_lyrics:
Kuwa wake Yesu, je ni kusudi lako?
Ungeenda naye, njia nyembamba?
Unataka aubebe, mzigo wako?
Awe Mwongozi wako.

Uwezo wake unakutosha, na damu yake itakusafi,
Kwa vile ukubali ni bora, afanye mapenzi yake nawe.

Unataka kuitika, anapokwita?
Kupata amani, kwa kumpa vyote?
Wataka uwezo, usianguke kamwe?
Awe Mwongozi wako.

Wataka raha katika, ufalme wake?
Ungeshinda kwa majaribu yote?
Ungefanya kazi yake, vizuri sana?
Awe Mwongozi wako.
english_lyrics:
Be Jesus', is that your purpose?
Would you go with him, the narrow way?
Do you want him to carry your burden?
Let him be your leader.

His power is sufficient for you, and his blood will cleanse you,
Since acceptance is better, let him do his will with you.

Do you want to happen, when he calls?
Find peace, by giving it all?
Want power, never fall?
Let him be your leader.

Do you want pleasure in his kingdom?
Would you overcome all the temptations?
Would you do his job, really well?
Let him be your leader.

title: Hasha Maneno Mabaya
swahili_lyrics:
Hasha maneno mabaya, yasitoke kinywani
Moyo mwema uzuie, ndimi zisichafuke.

“Nanyi pendeni,” asema Yesu,
(mpendane) (mpendane)
Kama mwanzo alivyotupenda,
“Nanyi pendeni,” asema Yesu,
(mpendane) (mpendane)
Wana tiini amri hii (amri heri hii).

Pendo ni mtakatifu, urafiki mzuri,
Visiharibike mara, kwa kunena vibaya.

Tusinene kwa hasira, inazaa huzuni,
Pendo lako ee Mwokozi, linatosha tushinde.
english_lyrics:
Even bad words, do not come out of the mouth
A kind heart should prevent, tongues should not get dirty.

"And love," says Jesus,
(love each other) (love each other)
As in the beginning he loved us,
"And love," says Jesus,
(love each other) (love each other)
They obey this commandment (this good commandment).

Love is holy, friendship is good,
Don't be ruined once, by speaking badly.

Let us not speak in anger, it breeds sorrow,
Your love, O Savior, is enough for us to overcome.

title: Huniongoza Mwokozi
swahili_lyrics:
Huniongoza Mwokozi, ndipo nami hufurahi,
Niendapo pote napo, ataniongoza papo.

Kuongoza hunishika, kwa mkono wa hakika,
Nitaandamana naye, Kristo aniongozaye.

Pengine ni mashakani, nami pengine rahani,
Ni radhi ijayo yote, yupo nami siku zote.

Mkono akinishika, kamwe sitanung’unika,
Atakachoniletea, ni tayari kupokea.

Nikiisha kazi chini, sitakimbia mauti,
Kushinda ni ya hakika, nikiongozwa na Baba.
english_lyrics:
The Savior guides me, then I rejoice,
Wherever I go, he will guide me instantly.

Guiding holds me, with a sure hand,
I will accompany him, Christ who leads me.

Perhaps it is doubt, and perhaps peace,
It is a pleasure to come all the time, he is always with me.

If your hand holds me, I will never complain,
What he will bring me, I am ready to receive.

When I'm done working on the ground, I won't run away from death,
Victory is certain, guided by the Father.

title: Karibu na Wewe
swahili_lyrics:
Karibu na wewe, Mungu wangu,
Karibu zaidi, Bwana wangu,
Siku zote niwe, karibu na wewe,
Karibu zaidi, Mungu wangu.

Mimi nasafiri, duniani,
Pa kupumzika, sipaoni,
Nilalapo niwe, karibu na wewe,
Karibu zaidi, Mungu wangu.

Yote unipayo, yanivuta,
Pa kukaribia nitapata,
Na nielekezwe, karibu na wewe,
Karibu zaidi, Mungu wangu.

Na kwa nguvu, zangu nikusifu,
Mwamba uwe, maji ya wokovu,
Mashakani niwe, karibu na wewe,
Karibu zaidi, Mungu wangu.

Na nyumbani juu, Baba yangu,
Nikinyakuliwa, toka huko,
Kwa furaha niwe, pamoja na wewe,
Karibu zaidi, Mungu wangu.
english_lyrics:
Near you, my God,
Nearer, my Lord,
Always be, next to you,
Closer, my God.

I travel, in the world,
Where to rest, I don't see,
When I sleep be, next to you,
Closer, my God.

All that you give me, draws me in,
When I get close I will find,
May I be guided, close to you,
Closer, my God.

And with strength, I praise you,
Be the rock, the water of salvation,
Doubts be, close to you,
Closer, my God.

And home above, my Father,
If I am caught up, get out of there,
Happily be I, with you,
Closer, my God.

title: Fikira Moja tu
swahili_lyrics:
Fikira moja tu, hurejea tena,
Nimekaribia mbingu, zaidi ya jana.

Karibu na, kwetu mbingu,
Karibu na kwetu sasa,
Nikwone karibu.

Karibu na kwetu, na kwenye makao,
Kiti cha enzi cha Mungu, pahali pa mto.

Kamilisha Yesu, kuamini kwangu,
Nikifika mwisho wangu, nikwone karibu.
english_lyrics:
Just one thought, it comes back again,
I am closer to heaven, more than yesterday.

Near to, to heaven,
Close to us now,
See me close.

Near us, and at home,
God's throne, by the river.

Complete Jesus, my trust,
When I reach my end, see me close.

title: Yanipasa Kuwa Naye
swahili_lyrics:
Yanipasa kuwa naye, Mwokozi Bwana wangu,
Akiwa karibu nami, napata nguvu kweli.

Moyo hauogopi, wala kutikisika.
Nitakwenda apendapo, kwa kuwa anilinda.

Yanipasa kuwa naye, kwani nategemea,
Anaweza kufariji, na maneno matamu.

Yanipasa kuwa naye maisha yangu yote,
Yakiwapo majaribu, na mashaka yo yote.

Yanipasa kuwa naye, katika njia zangu,
Macho yake yaongoza, hatua zangu zote.
english_lyrics:
I must have him, my Lord Saviour,
When he is near me, I really get strength.

The heart is not afraid, nor shaken.
I will go where he wants, because he protects me.

I must have him, because I depend on him,
He can comfort, with sweet words.

I have to be with him all my life,
When there are trials, and any doubts.

I must have him, in my ways,
His eyes guide, all my steps.

title: Njiani Huniongoza
swahili_lyrics:
Njiani huniongoza, Yesu wangu Mwokozi,
Rehema hatapunguza, milele kiongozi,
Ina raha kwandamana, duniani daima,
Nijaposumbuka sana, yeye hutenda vyema.

Njiani huniongoza, hupunguza matata,
Nikiugua hupoza, na njaa ninashiba,
Lichokapo guu langu, nguvu zikapungua,
Jiwe lilo mbele yangu, hunibubujikia.

Njiani huiongoza, kwa pendo lililo kuu,
Mwisho atanituliza, kwake Baba yangu juu,
Nikivikwa kutokufa, nikae na Mwokozi,
Nitamsifu sana sifa, kweli ni kiongozi.
english_lyrics:
On the way lead me, Jesus my Savior,
Mercy will not diminish, forever the leader,
It is pleasant to march, always on earth,
When I'm really upset, he behaves well.

On the way he guides me, he eases the trouble,
When I'm sick it cools, and when I'm hungry I'm full,
When my leg is tired, my strength is weak,
The stone is in front of me, it springs from me.

On the way he leads, with great love,
Finally he will calm me, to my Father above,
Clothed with immortality, I dwell with the Saviour,
I will praise him a lot, he is really a leader.

title: Uniongoze Yehova
swahili_lyrics:
Uniongoze Yehova, ni msafiri chini,
Ni mnyonge u hodari, nilinde kwa mkono.
Unitunze, unilinde, unionyeshe njia.

Na kisima cha uzima, maji ya utabibu,
Fungua na moyo wangu, ninywe na kuponyeka,
Uninyweshe, unilishe, hata nimetosheka.

Wakati wa kuuvuka, ule mto Yordani,
Hofu yangu hufariji, nione uso wako,
Nyimbo shangwe, nyimbo shangwe, nitaimba daima.
english_lyrics:
Guide me Jehovah, I am a traveler down,
I am weak, you are strong, protect me with your hand.
Take care of me, protect me, show me the way.

And the well of life, the water of healing,
Open with my heart, let me drink and be healed,
Give me drink, feed me, until I am satisfied.

When crossing it, the Jordan River,
My fear is comforted, I see your face,
Songs of joy, songs of joy, I will always sing.

title: Mfalme yu Mlangoni
swahili_lyrics:
Mfalme yu mlangoni, ndiye aliyetufia,
Mara wote wampendao, atawakusanya.

Yuaja, yuaja, mlangoni anasimama,
Anakuja, anakuja, kuja kwake karibu.

Dalili za kuja kwake, zinazidi kutimizwa,
Karibuni wateule, watamlaki Bwana.

Sitafute duniani, amani wala furaha,
Mpaka Bwana arudi, dhambi kuondoa.

Tutakaa na Mwokozi, makaoni ya milele,
Daima tutafurahi, kuwa watu wake.
english_lyrics:
The king is at the door, he is the one who died,
As many as he loves, he will gather them.

He comes, he comes, he stands at the door,
He's coming, he's coming, he's coming closer.

The signs of his coming are being fulfilled,
Welcome the elect, they will meet the Lord.

I will not seek in the world, peace or happiness,
Until the Lord returns, sin to remove.

We will dwell with the Saviour, eternal dwellings,
We will always be happy, to be his people.

title: U mwendo Gani Nyumbani?
swahili_lyrics:
U mwendo gani nyumbani? Mlinzi akanijibu,
“Usiku sasa waisha, macheo karibu,”
Usihuzunike tena, bali ulemee mwendo,
Hata ushike ufalme, kule mwangani juu.

Na tena niliuliza, nchi yote ikajibu,
“Sasa mwendo watimika, milele karibu,”
Usihuzunike tena, ishara kuu zasonga,
Na viumbe vyangojea, sauti ya Bwana.

Nikamwuliza shujaa, ndivyo kanitia moyo,
“Shikilia mapigano, kitambo yaisha,”
Usihuzunike tena, kazi ifanywe kwa moyo;
Tumeahidiwa tunu tuishapo shinda.

Siyo mbali na nyumbani, fikara tamu njiani,
yatupoza roho nayo, yafuta machozi,
Usihuzunike tena, kitambo tutakutana,
Wenye furaha kamili, nyumbani mwa Baba.
english_lyrics:
How are you doing at home? The guard answered me,
"The night is now over, the dawn is near,"
Don't be sad anymore, but keep moving,
Even hold the kingdom, in the light above.

And again I asked, the whole country answered,
"Now the journey will be fulfilled, forever near,"
Grieve no more, the great signs are moving,
And the creatures waited, the voice of the Lord.

I asked the hero, that's what encouraged me,
"Keep fighting, it will be over soon,"
Don't be sad anymore, let the work be done with heart;
We have been promised a reward when we win.

Not far from home, sweet thoughts on the way,
it cools the soul, wipes away tears,
Don't be sad anymore, we will meet soon,
Perfectly happy, in the Father's house.

title: Anakuja Upesi
swahili_lyrics:
Anakuja upesi Yesu Bwana wetu, msafiri mbali na kwao,
Alisema dhahiri “Nitakuja tena,” amina na uje Ee Bwana.

Yuaja, Yesu atarudi sasa, anakuja duniani,
Wasafiri wote watapumzika, Yesu anaporudi tena.

Makaburi yote wafu wanapolala, yatafunguliwa tena,
Na maelfu pale wataondoka tena, wasione machozi kamwe.

Hatutatengana na hao tena huko, nyimbo nzuri tutaimba,
Watakusanyika toka kila kabila, miguuni pa Mwana Kondoo.

Aleluya amin aleluya tena, upendo wake unashinda,
Tutamsifu milele hata tutashangaa, jinsi alivyotukomboa.
english_lyrics:
Jesus our Lord is coming soon, a traveler far from them,
He clearly said "I will come again," believe and come O Lord.

It is coming, Jesus is coming back now, he is coming to earth,
All travelers will rest, when Jesus returns again.

All graves when the dead sleep, shall be opened again,
And thousands there will depart again, never to see tears.

We will not be separated from them again there, we will sing beautiful songs,
They will gather from every tribe, at the feet of the Lamb.

Hallelujah amen hallelujah again, his love wins,
We will praise him forever until we will be surprised, how he redeemed us.

title: Watakatifu Kesheni
swahili_lyrics:
Watakatifu kesheni, nguvu za mbingu zagonga,
Washeni taa tayari, kwa kurudi kwake Bwana.

Yuaja, Yesu mfalme, yuaja mwenye fahari,
Yesu yuaja enzini, karibu Yesu uje.

Piga mbiu tangazeni, habari ya ukombozi,
Ya mponya wa upendo, nayo nguvu ya samaha.

Falme nyingi zaangushwa, panda ya saba yalia;
Tangaza neema yake, kabla ya kupita saa.

Mataifa yapotea, nchi zajaa uchungu,
Kristo anaharakisha, unabii unatimizwa.

Wenye dhambi njoni sasa, Kristo awapatanishe,
Mbio twaeni neema, kitambo muda waisha.
english_lyrics:
Saints on the alert, the powers of heaven strike,
Light the lamp already, for the return of the Lord.

He is coming, Jesus the king, he is coming in glory,
Jesus is coming to the kingdom, almost Jesus is coming.

Shout and proclaim, the news of redemption,
The healer of love, and the power of forgiveness.

Many kingdoms were overthrown, the seventh panda cried;
Declare his grace, before the hour passes.

Nations are lost, countries are full of pain,
Christ is hastening, prophecy is being fulfilled.

Sinners come now, Christ reconcile you,
Race to bring us grace, for a while the time will run out.

title: Piga Panda
swahili_lyrics:
Piga panda na ya makelele, Yesu yuaja tena,
Ipaze sauti imba sana, Yesu yuaja tena.

Anakuja, anakuja, Yesu yuaja tena.

Itoe mwangwi sana vilima, Yesu yuaja tena,
Yuaja kwa utukufu mwingi, Yesu yuaja tena.

Itangazwe mahali po pote, Yesu yuaja tena.
Mwokozi aliyetufilia, Yesu yuaja tena.

Kuona machafuko twajua, Yesu yuaja tena,
Mataifa yakasiriana, Yesu yuaja tena.

Maradhi hofu hutuhubiri, Yesu yuaja tena.
Taabu, njaa hutulilia, Yesu yuaja tena.
english_lyrics:
Beat the bells and whistles, Jesus is coming again,
Raise your voice and sing loudly, Jesus is coming again.

He is coming, he is coming, Jesus is coming again.

Let the hills echo loudly, Jesus is coming again,
It comes with great glory, Jesus is coming again.

Be announced everywhere, Jesus is coming again.
The Savior who died for us, Jesus is coming again.

Seeing the chaos we know, Jesus is coming again,
The nations are angry with each other, Jesus is coming again.

When fear preaches to us, Jesus is coming again.
Misery, hunger makes us cry, Jesus is coming again.

title: Tumaini Liko
swahili_lyrics:
Tumaini liko la thamani kuu,
Kupita anasa tupu zake ulimwengu.

Pana nyota nzuri nuru itoayo,
Kwetu wakati wa kifo ndio ufufuo.

Zikiumwa roho na hofu mashaka,
Sauti hutuambia Mungu hutupenda.

Kutoka Kalwari sauti hunena,
Nyota ni nuru ya mbingu tumaini letu.
english_lyrics:
Hope is precious,
Beyond the empty pleasures of the world.

There is a beautiful star that gives light,
For us, the time of death is resurrection.

If the soul is tormented by fear and doubt,
The voice tells us God loves us.

From Calvary a voice speaks,
The star is the light of heaven, our hope.

title: Pengine Ni Saa
swahili_lyrics:
Pengine ni saa ya kupambazuka, mishale ya jua
ipenyapo giza, kwamba atakuja Yesu mtukufu,
awapokee wake.

Bwana itakuwa lini, tutakapoimba,
“Anakuja, Bwana Yesu, Aleluya, Amin,
Aleluya, Amin?”

Pengine mchana pengine jioni, pengine usiku wa
manane, giza litatoweka kwa fahari akija, awapokee
wake.

Majeshi yake yataimba ‘hosana,’ na watakatifu
waliotukuzwa, watamsifu kwa kuwa amekuja,
awapokee wake.

Furaha tukiitwa pasipo kufa, pasipo kuona maradhi
machozi, kuchukuliwa winguni kwa fahari,
akija kwa watu wake.
english_lyrics:
It is probably the hour of dawn, the arrows of the sun
when the darkness penetrates, that the glorious Jesus will come,
receive his wives.

When will the Lord be, when we sing,
"He is coming, Lord Jesus, Hallelujah, Amen,
Hallelujah, Amen?”

Perhaps in the afternoon, perhaps in the evening, perhaps at night
midnight, the darkness will disappear with pride when he comes to receive you
his.

His armies will sing 'hosanna,' and the saints
glorified, they will praise him that he has come,
receive his wives.

Happy if we are called without dying, without seeing sickness
tears, taken to the cloud with pride,
coming to his people.

title: Unakaribia Wakati
swahili_lyrics:
Unakaribia wakati wa kuja kwa Yesu,
Atawachukua watu wake nyumbani juu.

Tunaiona mishale ya nuru inayopenya giza,
Tunaiona mishale ya nuru ya ufufuo.

Injili inatangazwa pote kwa mataifa,
Bwana wa Arusi atakuja na tarumbeta.

Pamoja na malaika zake Bwana arudi,
Awapeleke waaminifu wasife tena.

Wapenzi waliotengwa kale watakutana,
Machozi yao wenye huzuni yatafutika.
english_lyrics:
The time of Jesus' coming is near,
He will take his people home on high.

We see arrows of light piercing the darkness,
We see the arrows of resurrection light.

The gospel is preached to all the nations,
The Bridegroom will come with a trumpet.

May the Lord return with his angels,
Send the faithful to die no more.

Long-estranged lovers will meet,
Their sad tears will be wiped away.

title: Ahadi Tamu
swahili_lyrics:
Ahadi tamu kwa waamini, tazama nakuja upesi sana,
Uwe imara hatari kubwa, ndugu usilale, bali ukeshe.

Uihifadhi imani yako, dunia mpya itatolewa.
Njoo ingia furaha yangu, taji zinangoja, uwe imara.

Tutakesha na kutoa sala, atakuja kama mwivi kwa wengi,
Ya kwamba yu karibu twajua, ila hatujui ni siku gani.

Tunategemea neno lake, ambalo latangaza kuja kwake,
Tumaini letu ni ahadi, “naja karibuni,” uwe imara.
english_lyrics:
A sweet promise to the faithful, behold I am coming very quickly,
Be strong, great danger, brother, do not sleep, but stay awake.

If you keep your faith, a new world will be given.
Come enter my joy, crowns await, be strong.

We will watch and pray, he will come as a thief to many,
We know that it is near, but we don't know what day it is.

We rely on his word, which announces his coming,
Our hope is a promise, "I am coming soon," be strong.

title: Furaha kwa Ulimwengu
swahili_lyrics:
Furaha kwa ulimwengu, Bwana atakuja.
Kila moyo umpokee, viumbe imbeni,
Viumbe imbeni, viumbe vyote imbeni.

Na Bwana atatawala, watu na waimbe,
Miti milima na mawe, kariri furaha,
Kariri furaha, kariri furaha kubwa.

Atatawala kwa wema, atawafundisha
Mataifa haki yake, ajabu za pendo,
Ajabu za pendo, ajabu za pendo lake.
english_lyrics:
Joy to the world, the Lord will come.
Every heart receive him, creatures sing,
Sing creatures, all creatures sing.

And the Lord will reign, let the people sing,
Trees, mountains and rocks, chant joy,
Recite joy, recite great joy.

He will rule with goodness, he will teach you
Gentiles his justice, wonders of love,
The wonders of love, the wonders of his love.

title: Yesu Bwana Mwokozi
swahili_lyrics:
Yesu Bwana Mwokozi, aishi milele,
Najua kwamba yupo, pamoja na mimi;
Sauti nasikia, rehema naona,
Wakati namhitaji, yupo nami.

Yu hai, yu hai, yu hai Bwana Yesu,
Atembea, azungumza nami siku zote.
Yu hai, yu hai, kutoa uzima,
Hivi ndivyo nijuavyo,
Yu hai ndani yangu.

Ulinzi wake upo, naona dhahiri,
Miguu ichokapo, sikati tamaa,
Najua aniongoza, katika dhoruba,
Siku ya kuja kwake, nitamwona.
english_lyrics:
Jesus Lord Savior, may he live forever,
I know that he is there, with me;
Voice I hear, mercy I see,
When I need him, he is with me.

He is alive, he is alive, he is alive Lord Jesus,
He walks, talks to me all the time.
He is alive, he is alive, giving life,
This is what I know,
He is alive in me.

His protection is there, I see clearly,
When the legs are broken, I don't give up,
I know he leads me, in the storm,
On the day of his coming, I will see him.

title: Tarumbeta ya Mwana
swahili_lyrics:
Tarumbeta ya Mwana itakapolia mara,
Milele itakapopambazuka,
Nao wa haki watakapokusanyika ng’ambo,
Majina yaitwapo lo! niweko.

Majina yaitwapo lo, Majina yaitwapo lo,
Majina yaitwapo lo, Majina yaitwapo lo niweko.

Siku ile watakatifu watakapoamka,
Nakuondoka huru kaburini,
Watakapokusanyika makaoni kule juu,
Majina yaitwapo lo niweko.

Tutende kazi ya Yesu mchana kutwa kwa bidii,
Tutangaze kote pendo lake kuu,
Nayo kazi itakapotimika hapa chini,
Majina yaitwapo lo niweko.
english_lyrics:
When the Son's trumpet shall sound,
When eternity dawns,
And when the righteous shall gather abroad,
When the names are called oh! I am there.

When names are called, when names are called,
When names are called, when names are called, I am there.

On that day when the saints will wake up,
I leave you free from the grave,
When they gather in the throne above,
When names are called, I am there.

Let us do the work of Jesus diligently all day long,
Let us proclaim his great love,
And when the work is done below,
When names are called, I am there.

title: Hapo Yesu Atakapoita
swahili_lyrics:
Hapo Yesu atakapoita, mataifa mbele yake,
Tutashindaje kwenye hukumu, mbele ya kiti cha enzi.

Atakusanya ngano ghalani, atatupa mbali makapi,
Tutashindaje hukumuni, siku kuu ya kiyama?

Je tutasikia neno tamu, “Vema wewe mtumwa mwema,”
Ama wenye uchungu na hofu, tutakatazwa ufalme?

Atakubali tu kwa furaha, watoto wake wapendwa,
Atawapa mavazi meupe, wakae kitini pake.

Hivyo tukeshe nasi tungoje, wenye taa zinazowaka,
Tutakapoitwa arusini, tuwe tayari kumlaki.

Roho ikielekea mbingu, twangoja wenye saburi,
Hata safari yetu iishe, tukae kwake milele.
english_lyrics:
When Jesus calls, the nations before him,
How shall we prevail at the judgment, before the throne?

He will gather the wheat into the barn, he will throw away the chaff,
How will we win in judgment, the great day of judgment?

Will we hear the sweet word, "Well done, good servant,"
As for those with pain and fear, will we be denied the kingdom?

He will only gladly accept, his dear children,
He will give them white clothes, and they will sit in his chair.

So let's stay awake and wait, with lights burning,
When we are called to the wedding, let us be ready to meet him.

As the spirit goes to heaven, we wait patiently,
Even when our journey ends, let us stay with him forever.

title: Siitafuti Mali
swahili_lyrics:
Siitafuti mali, wala utajiri,
Nataka kwa yakini, nipate Mwokozi.
Chuoni mwa ufalme, niambie Yesu,
Jina langu yakini, je limeandikwa?

Je limeandikwa? Jina langu huko?
Kitabuni mbinguni, je, limeandikwa?

Dhambi zangu ni nyingi, ni kama mchanga,
Lakini damu yako, mwokozi yatosha,
Kwani umeahidi, zijapo nyekundu,
Zitakuwa nyeupe, ilivyo theluji.

Mji mzuri sana, wa majumba makuu,
Walipo malaika, mji bila ovu,
Wakaapo walio, na mavazi safi,
Je limeandikwa, jina langu huko.
english_lyrics:
I do not seek wealth, nor riches,
I want for sure, to find a Savior.
In the college of the kingdom, tell me Jesus,
My name sure, is it written?

Is it written? My name there?
In the book in heaven, is it written?

My sins are many, they are like sand,
But your blood, savior, is enough,
Because you promised, they come red,
They will be white, like snow.

A very beautiful city, of great palaces,
Where angels are, a city without evil,
Those who swore, with clean clothes,
Is it written, my name there?

title: Imeanzishwa Hukumu
swahili_lyrics:
Imeanzishwa hukumu mbinguni, tutasimamaje pale,
Apimapo Mungu Hakimu, kila wazo na tendo?

Tutasimamaje sote katika siku kuu ile?
Dhambi zetu zitafutika, ama zitatuangusha?

Wametangulia wafu kupimwa, kitambo ndipo wahai,
Watapokea neno la mwisho, vitabuni mwa Mungu.

Tutasimamaje usiku ule, siri zetu kila moja,
Zafunuliwa toka vitabu, Yesu atusaidie!
english_lyrics:
Judgment has been established in heaven, how shall we stand there,
When God judges, every thought and action?

How will we all stand on that great day?
Will our sins be erased, or will it bring us down?

They have gone before the dead to be judged, for a while then the living,
They will receive the last word, in the books of God.

How will we stand that night, our secrets each,
They are revealed from the books, Jesus help us!

title: Mfalme Wetu Atuita
swahili_lyrics:
Mfalme wetu atuita, tukae karamuni kwake,
Itakuwaje nasi kule, Bwana ajapo?

Bwana ajapo ndugu, Bwana ajapo,
Itakuwaje na sisi, Bwana akija?

Atavikwa vizuri sana, taji badala ya miiba,
Kweli tukeo la fahari, Bwana ajapo.

Kwa furaha awakubali, wenye mavazi ya arusi,
Tu wa heri tukimridhisha, Bwana ajapo.

Kutakuwako na utengo, watalia waliomwasi,
Cha kutisha kipindi kile, Kristo ajapo!

Mfalme utupe neema, sisi tunapokungojea,
Tusiogope kukuona, ujapo Bwana.
english_lyrics:
Our king will call us, let us sit at his banquet,
What will happen to us there, when the Lord comes?

The Lord is coming brother, the Lord is coming,
What will happen to us, when the Lord comes?

He will be very well clothed, a crown instead of thorns,
Truly a place of pride, the Lord is coming.

Happily to receive you, those in wedding garments,
Only if we satisfy him, the Lord will come.

There will be division, the rebels will cry,
Terrible at that time, Christ is coming!

King give us grace, as we wait for you,
Let us not be afraid to see you, Lord.

title: Hatujui Saa
swahili_lyrics:
Hatujui saa ya kuja kwa Bwana, lakini dalili zasema
karibu, Atakaporudi lakini kwa kweli, hatujui saa.

Atakuja, kwa vile tukeshe,
Atakuja, Mwokozi aleluya,
Atakuja kwa fahari, ya baba yake,
Hatujui saa.

Pana nuru kwao wapendao haki, pana kweli katika chuo
cha Mungu, Unabii hufundisha kuja kwake, hatujui saa.

Tutakesha na tutaomba daima, tutafanya kazi mpaka
akija, Tutaimba na tutasoma ishara, hatujui saa.
english_lyrics:
We do not know the hour of the coming of the Lord, but the signs tell
near, when He will return but in truth, we do not know the hour.

He will come, if we watch,
He will come, the Savior hallelujah,
He will come in pride, of his father,
We don't know the time.

There is light for those who love justice, there is truth in the college
of God, Prophecy teaches his coming, we do not know the hour.

We will watch and we will always pray, we will work until
coming, We will sing and we will read the sign, we do not know the hour.

title: Sijui Atakapokuja
swahili_lyrics:
Sijui atakapokuja, mchana au usiku,
Labda saa ya alasiri, pengine ni alfajiri,
Hutwambia tuwe tayari, taa zetu tusizime,
Ili ajapo atukute, tuwe tukimngoja Yeye.

Tu... kimngoje.......a,
(Kukesha tunakungoja Wewe)
Tu... kimngoja.......a,
(Kukesha tunakungoja Wewe)
Tu... kimngoje........a,
(Kukesha tunakungoja wewe)
Twakesha twamngoja Yeye.

Nakumbuka huruma zake, bei ya wokovu wetu,
Aliacha nyumba tukufu, awafilie wabaya,
Ninadhani itampendeza, kama sisi watu wake,
Tukionyesha pendo letu, tuwe tukimngoja Yeye.

Ee Yesu Mwokozi mpendwa, wajua nalihifadhi,
Tumaini la kukuona, la kukaribishwa nawe,
Ukija kwa watu wengine, kama mhukumu wao,
Kwangu utakuwa rafiki, nakesha nakungojea.
english_lyrics:
I don't know when he will come, day or night,
Maybe afternoon, maybe dawn,
He tells us to be ready, not to turn off our lights,
So that when he comes to find us, we should be waiting for him.

Just...wait for it.......a,
(Staying awake we are waiting for you)
Just... wait for it.......a,
(Staying awake we are waiting for you)
Just... wait for it........a,
(Stay awake we are waiting for you)
We stay awake waiting for Him.

I remember his compassion, the price of our salvation,
He left the noble house, to kill the wicked,
I think it will please him, as we his people,
If we show our love, we should be waiting for Him.

O dear Jesus Savior, you know I keep you,
Hope to see you, to be welcomed by you,
If you come to other people, as their judge,
You will be my friend, I am awake and waiting for you.

title: Nitaonana na Yesu
swahili_lyrics:
Nitaonana na Yesu, uso kwa uso kweli,
Siku ile shangwe tele, nikimwona Mwokozi.

Tutaonana kwa macho, huko kwetu mbinguni,
Na kwa utukufu wake, nitamwona milele.

Sasa siwezi kujua, jinsi alivyo hasa,
Bali atakapokuja, nitamwona halisi.

Mbele yake yafukuzwa, machozi na huzuni,
Kipotovu kitanyoshwa, fumbo litafumbuka.

Uso kwa uso hakika, palepale furaha,
Nitafurahi kabisa, nikimwona Mwokozi.
english_lyrics:
I will see Jesus, face to face indeed,
That day full of joy, seeing the Savior.

We will see eye to eye, there in heaven,
And by his glory, I will see him forever.

Now I can't tell, what he really is,
But when he comes, I will see him for real.

Before him were banished, tears and sorrow,
The pervert will be exposed, the mystery will be revealed.

Face to face indeed, there joy,
I will be very happy, seeing the Savior.

title: Ati twonane Mtoni?
swahili_lyrics:
Ati twonane mtoni? Maji mazuri ya mbingu,
Yanatokea mwangani, penye kiti cha Mungu.

Naam twonane mtoni, watakatifu kwenu ni mtoni,
Tutakutanika kule mtoni, penye kiti cha Mungu.

Tukitembea mtoni, na Yesu mchunga wetu,
Daima tu ibadani, usoni pake kwetu.

Tukisafiri mtoni, tutue ulemeao,
Wema wa Mungu yakini, una taji na vazi

Kwang’ara sana mtoni, cha Mwokozi ni kioo,
Milele hatuachani, tumsifu kwa nyimbo.

Karibu sana mtoni, karibu tutawasili,
Mara huwa furahani, na amani ya kweli.
english_lyrics:
And two eight in the river? The beautiful water of heaven,
They appear in the light, at the throne of God.

Well two eight in the river, your saints are in the river,
We will meet you at the river, where God's seat is.

Walking in the river, with Jesus our shepherd,
Always in worship, in his face to us.

If we travel on the river, let us be burdened,
The goodness of God is sure, you have a crown and a robe

Very bright in the river, the Savior is a mirror,
We do not leave each other forever, we praise him with songs.

So close to the river, we're almost there,
Sometimes there is joy, and true peace.

title: Kazi Yangu Ikiisha
swahili_lyrics:
Kazi yangu ikiisha, nami nikiokoka,
Na kuvaa kutokuharibika,
Nitamjua Mwokozi, nivukapo ng’amboni,
Atakuwa wa kwanza kunilaki.

Nitamjua, nitamjua, nikimwona uso kwa uso,
Nitamjua, nitamjua, kwa alama za misumari.

Kuona uso wake, kutanipa Furaha,
Furaha isiyo ya kukomesha,
Nitamsifu Mwokozi, kwa rehema na pendo,
Vilivyonipa pahali mbinguni.

Nao waliokufa, katika Bwana Yesu,
Nitawaona tena huko juu,
Lakini nifikapo, kwake huko mbinguni,
Nataka kumwona Mwokozi kwanza.

Milangoni mwa mji, Bwana atanipisha,
Pasipo machozi wala huzuni,
Nitauimba wimbo, wa milele lakini,
Nataka kumwona Mwokozi kwanza.
english_lyrics:
When my work is finished, and I survive,
And put on incorruption,
I will know the Saviour, when I cross the other side,
He will be the first to meet me.

I'll know him, I'll know him, when I see him face to face,
I will know him, I will know him, by the marks of the nails.

To see his face, will give me Joy,
Unceasing joy,
I will praise the Saviour, for mercy and love,
That gave me a place in heaven.

And those who died, in the Lord Jesus,
I'll see you up there again,
But when I come, to him in heaven,
I want to see the Savior first.

At the gates of the city, the Lord will swear to me,
Without tears or sorrow,
I will sing a song, eternal but,
I want to see the Savior first.

title: Ukingoni Mwa Yordani
swahili_lyrics:
Ukingoni mwa Yordani, ninaangalia,
Bara nzuri ya Kanaani, ninayotamani.

Tutakaa pamoja na Yesu,
Katika pwani yenye raha,
Tutaimba wimbo wa Musa na Kondoo,
Milele hata milele.

Bara ile ina nuru, nuru ya milele,
Kristo jua hutawala, hufukuza giza.

Nitapafikia lini, na kubarikiwa,
Penye ufalme wa Baba, na kumwona uso.

Furaha yangu rohoni ni kuchukuliwa,
Siyaogopi mawimbi katika Yordani.
english_lyrics:
On the banks of the Jordan, I look,
The beautiful land of Canaan, which I desire.

We will stay with Jesus,
On a pleasant beach,
We will sing the song of Moses and the Lamb,
Forever and ever.

The continent has light, eternal light,
Christ the sun rules, drives out darkness.

When shall I reach, and be blessed,
Enter the Father's kingdom, and see his face.

My joy in the soul is taken,
He is not afraid of the waves in Jordan.
