title: Wavunaji Watafurahi
swahili_lyrics:
Wavunaji watafurahi, pale watakaporudi,
Wakiyaleta mavuno, hata Yerusalemu.

Furaha wataipata, furaha hata milele,
Furaha wataipata, wakati wa mavuno.

Na siku ile tutaimba, kumshukuru na kumsifu,
Bwana Yesu jumbe wetu, kule Yerusalemu.

Wavunaji watafurahi, makaoni mwa milele,
Yaliyowekwa tayari, kule Yerusalemu.
english_lyrics:
The harvesters will rejoice, when they return,
Bringing the harvest to Jerusalem.

Happiness they will find, happiness forever,
Happiness they will find, at harvest time.

And on that day we will sing, thank and praise him,
Lord Jesus, our messenger, in Jerusalem.

The reapers will rejoice, forever and ever,
It was already set, in Jerusalem.

title: Pana Mahali Pazuri Mno
swahili_lyrics:
Pana mahali pazuri mno, twapaona kwa mbali sana,
Baba yetu angoja pale, amepanga makao yetu.

Kitambo tu bado, tutakutana ng’ambo pale,
Kitambo tu bado, tutakutana ng’ambo pale.

Tutaimba pale kwa moyo, nyimbo tamu za wenye heri,
Na rohoni hatutaona, tena haja ya kupumzika.

Kwa Baba yetu mkarimu, tutatoa shukrani sana,
Kwa kipaji cha pendo lake, na baraka anazotupa.
english_lyrics:
There is a very beautiful place, we can see it from far away,
Our father waits there, he has prepared our abode.

Just a little while, we will meet on the other side,
Just a little while, we will meet on the other side.

We will sing there from the heart, sweet songs of the blessed,
And in the spirit we will not see, again the need to rest.

To our kind Father, we will give thanks,
With the talent of his love, and the blessings he gives us.

title: Mahali pa Maji
swahili_lyrics:
Mahali pa maji mazuri, maji ya uzima,
Anapotungojea Yesu, tutakaribishwa.

Mahali pa maji mazuri, penye maji ya uzima,
Tutakaa na Mwokozi, chemchemi ya uzima.

Tunapochoka safarini, tamu kupumzika.
Panapo maji ya uzima, yatufurahisha.

Una kiu? uje kwa Yesu, utaburudishwa,
Yesu yu maji ya uzima, unywe uokoke.
english_lyrics:
A place of good water, water of life,
When Jesus waits for us, we will be welcomed.

A place of good water, of living water,
We will dwell with the Savior, the fountain of life.

When we are tired on the journey, sweet to rest.
Where there is living water, it will make us happy.

Are you thirsty? come to Jesus, you will be refreshed,
Jesus is the water of life, drink it and be saved.

title: Mchana Hauishi
swahili_lyrics:
Mchana hauishi, mjini mzuri,
Mji hautapita, na hapana giza.

Machozi yatafutwa, kifo hakuna kule,
Hawahesabu siku, na hapana giza.

Milango ni ya lulu, mjini mzuri,
Dhahabu njia zake, na hapana giza.

Milango haifungwi, mjini mzuri,
Mto ni wa uzima, na hapana giza.

Hawahitaji jua, mjini mzuri,
Mwana Kondoo nuru, na hapana giza.
english_lyrics:
The day does not live, in the beautiful city,
The city will not pass, and there is no darkness.

Tears will be wiped away, death is not there,
They do not count the days, and there is no darkness.

The gates are of pearl, in the beautiful city,
His ways are golden, and there is no darkness.

The doors are not closed, in the beautiful city,
The river is of life, and there is no darkness.

They don't need sun, in a beautiful city,
The Lamb is light, and there is no darkness.

title: Furaha na Raha
swahili_lyrics:
Furaha na raha tutapata, furaha na raha tutapata,
Furaha na raha tutapata, Yesu anaporudi.

Yesu anaporudi (rudi), Yesu anaporudi (rudi),
Furaha na raha tutapata, Yesu anaporudi.

Tutaimba nyimbo za shangwe kuu,
Tutaimba nyimbo za shangwe kuu,
Tutaimba nyimbo za shangwe kuu ,Yesu anaporudi.

Hapana machozi arudipo, hapana machozi arudipo,
Hapana machozi arudipo, kwa wateule wake.
english_lyrics:
Joy and pleasure we shall have, joy and pleasure we shall have,
We will find joy and comfort when Jesus returns.

When Jesus returns (return), when Jesus returns (return),
We will find joy and comfort when Jesus returns.

We will sing songs of great joy,
We will sing songs of great joy,
We will sing songs of great joy, when Jesus returns.

No tears return, no tears return,
No tears when he returns, for his chosen ones.

title: Vitu Vyote ni Sawa
swahili_lyrics:
Vitu vyote ni sawa, panapo pendo,
Kila sauti tamu, panapo pendo.
Pana amani pale, na furaha nyumbani,
Siku zote salama, panapo pendo.

Panapo upendo, siku zote salama, panapo pendo.

Furaha i nyumbani, panapo pendo,
Hapana machukizo, panapo pendo,
Chakula ni kitamu, mashamba yasitawi,
Maisha ni kamili, panapo pendo.

Hata mbinguni juu, pana furaha,
Wakiona upendo, nyumbani mwetu.
Macho yanapendezwa, na viumbe vya Mungu,
Naye Mungu huona, panapo pendo.

Ee Yesu niwe wako, wako kabisa,
Ndipo patakuwako pendo nyumbani.
Nitakaa salama, sitaifanya dhambi,
Nitabarikiwa tu, panapo pendo.
english_lyrics:
All things are equal, where there is love,
Every sweet sound, where there is love.
Peace be there, and joy at home,
Always safe, where there is love.

Where there is love, always safe, where there is love.

Happiness is at home, where there is love,
There is no hatred, where there is love,
The food is delicious, the fields flourish,
Life is perfect, where there is love.

Even in heaven above, there is joy,
If they see love, in our home.
The eyes are pleased, and God's creatures,
And God sees, where there is love.

O Jesus, I am yours, yours completely,
Then there will be love at home.
I will stay safe, I will not sin,
I will only be blessed, where there is love.

title: Mungu U Mapenzi
swahili_lyrics:
Mungu u mapenzi makamilifu, yapitayo fahamu za watu,
Twanyenyekea sisi wapungufu, wape baraka wapenzi wetu.

Ewe Mapenzi yasiyopimika, twawaombea kitini Mwako,
Wape mapenzi yasiyotindika, waliooana mbele yako.

Ewe uhai, wewe u dhamana, ya imani na matumaini,
Wape kuvumilia hapa sana wasiche maumivu mwishoni.

Wape furaha hiyo iwezayo, kutia nuru kwenye huzuni,
Wape amani hiyo itokayo, katika matata duniani.

Waende mbele kusaidiana, maisha yao ulimwenguni,
Hata mwisho, ni kuja kwake Yesu, wafurahi milele mbinguni.
english_lyrics:
God is a perfect will, beyond the understanding of people,
We humble ourselves, give blessings to our loved ones.

O immeasurable Love, we pray for Your hand,
Give unrequited love to those who are married before you.

O life, you are the guarantee, of faith and hope,
Give them patience here so they don't feel pain in the end.

Give them that joy that can, to light the sorrow,
Give them the peace that comes from the troubles in the world.

Let them go forward to help each other, their lives in the world,
Even at the end, it is the coming of Jesus, may they rejoice forever in heaven.

title: Tuonanapo na Rafiki
swahili_lyrics:
Tuonanapo na rafiki sote twafurahi,
Ila tumepaswa mwishowe kuagana tena.

Hatutaagana tena nyumbani mbinguni,
Kwenye nchi tamu juu, hatutaagana.

Twatumaini kwa furaha tutaonana juu,
Na rafiki tulioaga tuishapo shinda.

Kule hatutatamka kamwe neno la kuaga,
Tutaimba daima tena nyimbo za furaha.
english_lyrics:
When we see a friend we are all happy,
But we had to finally say goodbye again.

We will never say goodbye again at home in heaven,
In the sweet land above, we will not part.

We hope to see you at the top,
And the friend we said goodbye to when we win.

There we will never say goodbye,
We will always sing happy songs again.

title: Kufariki Naye Yesu
swahili_lyrics:
Kufariki naye Yesu, usingizi wenye heri,
Raha isiyofujika, kwa majonzi na adui.

Kufariki naye Yesu, lo ya kubwaga simanzi
Na kulala na amani, hata Bwana awatuze.

Kufariki naye Yesu, heri watakaoamshwa,
Wataona siku ile, utukufu wake Bwana.

Kufariki naye Yesu, wataamka aitapo,
Watapasua kaburi, na kutoka watukufu.
english_lyrics:
Die with Jesus, sweet sleep,
An inexhaustible pleasure, for sorrows and enemies.

To die with Jesus, what a pity
And sleep in peace, may the Lord reward you.

Died with Jesus, blessed are those who will be resurrected,
They will see that day, the glory of the Lord.

Die with Jesus, they will wake up when he calls,
They will tear open the grave, and come out glorious.

title: Wimbi la Damu
swahili_lyrics:
Wimbi la damu ya Yesu, linatutakasa,
Aliumia kusudi, tupate uzima.

Wimbi la damu naona, naingia natakaswa,
Bwana asifiwe sana, hutakasa hutakasa.

Damu inasema kwangu, nasikia mvuto,
Inasema moyo wangu, hutakaswa nayo.

Naondoka kutembea, kwa nuru ya mbingu,
Mavazi yamesafishwa, moyoni ni Yesu.

Neema ni ya ajabu, kutakaswa ndani,
Na kuwa naye Yesu tu, aliye Mwokozi.
english_lyrics:
The wave of the blood of Jesus, cleanses us,
He was hurt for the purpose, that we may have life.

I see a wave of blood, I enter and am cleansed,
May the Lord be greatly praised, you purify, you purify.

The blood speaks to me, I feel the gravity,
It says my heart, you will not be cleansed by it.

I leave to walk, by the light of heaven,
The clothes are cleaned, the heart is Jesus.

Grace is wonderful, sanctified within,
And have only Jesus, who is the Savior.

title: Mimina Upya
swahili_lyrics:
Mimina upya, nguvu toka juu,
Tupe pendo lako, ewe Mwokozi.

Twakusihi sana, Yesu Mwokozi,
Tubatize upya, kwa Roho leo.

Kwako twalia, wenye maovu,
Osha moyo wetu, ututakase.

Kipaji cha juu, kitume kwetu,
Tubariki sasa, utufariji.

Isikilize, kwa moyo wazi,
Sauti ya Roho, ubarikiwe.
Meza ya Bwana
english_lyrics:
Pour forth, strength from above,
Give us your love, O Savior.

We beseech you, Jesus the Savior,
Rebaptize us, in the Spirit today.

To you we cry, wicked ones,
Wash our heart, purify us.

High talent, send it to us,
Bless us now, comfort us.

Listen to it, with an open heart,
Voice of the Spirit, bless you.
The Lord's Table

title: Raha Yangu Yote, Bwana
swahili_lyrics:
Raha yangu yote Bwana, i mbavuni pako,
Mimi sina haja tena, ila kifo chako.

Mwokozi uliyekufa, nawe ndiwe Mungu,
Kifo chako ni kwa dhambi, ziondoe zangu.

Nioshe na niwe wako, nawe uwe wangu,
Nioshe damuni mwako, liwe fungu langu.

Nioshe si miguu tu, osha tangu nyayo,
Hata kichwa changu juu, na ndani ya moyo,

Na iwe kafara damu, nifanyapo kazi,
Hata imani itimu, nikuone Mwokozi.
english_lyrics:
All my joy, Lord, is in your side,
I have no need anymore, but your death.

Saviour, who died, and you are God,
Your death is for sin, take it away from me.

Wash me and be yours, and you be mine,
Wash me in your blood, let it be my portion.

Wash me not only the feet, wash from the soles,
Even my head up, and in my heart,

And let the blood be the sacrifice, when I work,
Even my faith, let me see the Savior.

title: Mkate wa Mbingu
swahili_lyrics:
Mkate wa mbingu mega kwetu, ulivyotoa kwa thenashara,
Katika kitabu twakuona, Moyo unatweta kukutana.

Neno la ukweli libariki, tusikie mwito wa upole,
Vizuizi vyote vitakoma, tena tutapata uungwana.

Uzima na nguvu utanena, nakimbilia kukufuata,
Lakini mnyonge ndiye mimi: naye mshindaji ndiye wewe!
english_lyrics:
The bread of heaven is great for us, which you have given to us,
In the book we saw, The heart is waiting to meet.

Let the word of truth bless, let us hear the gentle call,
All restrictions will cease, again we will find civility.

Life and strength will speak, I rush to follow you,
But wretched am I: and conqueror art thou!

title: Mwamba Wenye Imara
swahili_lyrics:
Mwamba wenye imara, kwako nitajificha,
Maji hayo na damu, yaliyotoka humu,
Hunisafi na dhambi, hunifanya mshindi.

Kwa kazi zote pia, sitimizi sheria.
Nijapofanya bidii, nikilia na kudhii,
Hayaishi makosa, ndiwe wa kuokoa.

Sina cha mkononi, naja msalabani,
Nili tupu nivike, ni mnyonge nishike,
Nili mchafu naja, nioshe nisijafa.

Nikungojapo chini, na kwenda kaburini,
Nipaapo mbinguni, na kukwona enzini,
Roho yangu na iwe, rahani mwako wewe.
english_lyrics:
Strong rock, in you I will hide,
That water and blood, which came from here,
Cleanse me from sin, make me victorious.

For all jobs too, I do not obey the law.
When I have labored, wept and blasphemed,
Don't live mistakes, you are the one to save.

I have nothing in hand, I come to the cross,
I am empty to wear, I am weak to hold,
I was dirty, come on, wash me before I die.

When I waited on the ground, and went to the grave,
I swear in heaven, and see in heaven,
May my soul rest in peace.

title: Sauti ya Mchungaji
swahili_lyrics:
Sauti ya Mchungaji, ninasikia jangwani,
Kondoo waliopotea, anawaita warudi.

Leteni, leteni, leteni toka dhambini,
Leteni, leteni, waleteni kwa Yesu.

Nani atakayekwenda, amsaidie Mchungaji,
Awarudishe zizini, wasife bure gizani.

Usikose kusikia, sauti ya Mchungaji,
Kondoo waliopotea nenda na kuwatafuta.
english_lyrics:
The Shepherd's voice, I hear in the desert,
He calls the lost sheep to return.

Bring, bring, bring from sin,
Bring, bring, bring them to Jesus.

Who will go, help the Shepherd,
Bring them back to the fold, let them not die in the dark.

Do not fail to hear, the voice of the Pastor,
Lost sheep go and find them.

title: Twaomba Bwana
swahili_lyrics:
Twaomba Bwana, umpokee kama mhudumu,
Ambaye anajitoa, kuwa mtumishi.

Twaomba Bwana, umpokee kama mhudumu,
Neno lako alitoe, mwangaza kung’aa.

Mwokozi wetu, twaomba na umwandikie,
Kitabuni mwako, juu mjumbe wa injili.

Silaha zake, apewe kumshinda adui,
Vitani awe hodari, mpaka mauti.

Yeye ashindaye, Bwana kwa rehema yako,
Ile taji ya dhahabu, nawe utampa.
Kuweka Kanisa Wakfu
english_lyrics:
We ask the Lord, accept him as a minister,
Who gives himself, to be a servant.

We ask the Lord, accept him as a minister,

Mungu hujibu maombi, asubuhi na mchana,
Hata hutungojea tena, wakati wa jioni.

Na tuimbe asubuhi, tena saa za mchana.
english_lyrics:
Pray hard in the morning, pray hard in the afternoon,
Pray a lot and in the evening, the Lord hears us.

God answers prayers, morning and afternoon,
He even waits for us again, in the evening.

Let us sing in the morning, again in the afternoon.
